Not the news I was hoping to give you...
| Friend,
---
I wish I had better news for you...
---
**With just hours to go until the end-of-month deadline, we’re still $13,149 short of our August goal.**
---
_But as a U.S. Army Captain, I NEVER give up._
---
That’s why I’m extending our match for __one more hour__ to give us the final push we need to CRUSH our goal.
---
Can I count on YOUR support at the final hour, Friend?

clean_body: Not the news I was hoping to give you... | Friend, I wish I had better news for you... With just hours to go until the end-of-month deadline, we’re still $13,149 short of our August goal. But as a U.S. Army Captain, I NEVER give up. That’s why I’m extending our match for one more hour to give us the final push we need to CRUSH our goal. Can I count on YOUR support at the final hour, Friend? Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Wesley Hunt Sent: Mon, Aug 30, 2021 Subject: LEAKED: Pelosi retiring? To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, First, Nancy Pelosi was caught telling her donors in private that the Democrats are in danger of losing their House majority because of our race for Texas’s new congressional seat. Now, leaked reports suggest that Pelosi will even RETIRE if we FLIP the 5 SEATS needed to take back the House. This is a moment far too many years in the making... but we can’t let this opportunity go to waste. That’s why I’ve secured a match for the next hour to capitalize on this momentum and ensure we cover the remaining $32,577 of our August goal before the end-of-month deadline. While we may have the momentum, we can’t take this situation lightly. Just because Pelosi will throw in the towel if we flip the House, doesn't mean she’s going to give up her radical majority without a fight. In fact, she’s already raised $36.5 MILLION in just three months to try and save her razor-thin majority. As one of the 5 seats we need to flip to take back the House, we simply can’t afford to miss a single fundraising deadline. name: Erica Smith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
This is your last chance to make an impact on our emergency AmERICA Fund.
#
Our campaign is scrappy, tough, and NOT beholden to anyone.
That’s why reaching our emergency goal of raising $10,000 to the AmERICA Fund before midnight will send such a big message to the naysayers who are underestimating our campaign.
Well, I have an update on that fundraising goal:
At 11:30 AM this morning, we were $4,213 away. At 2:30 PM, we were $3,178 away. **Now, we are just $2,242 away from reaching $10,000 directly in the AmERICA Fund!**
[**_Will you please make a donation of $5 or more to help raise the remaining $2,242 we need before midnight tonight? This is your last chance to make an impact on our emergency AmERICA Fund._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13097?refcode=em20210831-399&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=399%2E3698%2EYpC-n_)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13097?refcode=em20210831-399&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=399%2E3698%2EYpC-n_)**
I’ve learned by now: A campaign can be won or lost by the amount of money raised early on.
That’s why meeting EVERY SINGLE fundraising goal we set for ourselves is so important. And unlike other establishment campaigns in this primary, we’re not getting any help from the major Democratic donors. **That’s what makes the AmERICA Fund so important.**
Instead, we’re appealing directly to good people like you online. People who believe that issues like Medicare for All, reparations, and a Green New Deal aren’t just possible in North Carolina, but urgent and necessary.
[**_So, can I please count on your help today? Please chip in to the AmERICA Fund before midnight and raise the final $2,242 we need to catch up on our August fundraising._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13097?refcode=em20210831-399&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=399%2E3698%2EYpC-n_)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13097?refcode=em20210831-399&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=40&akid=399%2E3698%2EYpC-n_)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica ❤️
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210831-399-footer&t=41&refcode2=399_3698_YpC-n_&akid=399%2E3698%2EYpC-n_)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

clean_body: This is your last chance to make an impact on our emergency AmERICA Fund. Our campaign is scrappy, tough, and NOT beholden to anyone. That’s why reaching our emergency goal of raising $10,000 to the AmERICA Fund before midnight will send such a big message to the naysayers who are underestimating our campaign. Well, I have an update on that fundraising goal: At 11:30 AM this morning, we were $4,213 away. At 2:30 PM, we were $3,178 away. Now, we are just $2,242 away from reaching $10,000 directly in the AmERICA Fund! I’ve learned by now: A campaign can be won or lost by the amount of money raised early on. That’s why meeting EVERY SINGLE fundraising goal we set for ourselves is so important. And unlike other establishment campaigns in this primary, we’re not getting any help from the major Democratic donors. That’s what makes the AmERICA Fund so important. Instead, we’re appealing directly to good people like you online. People who believe that issues like Medicare for All, reparations, and a Green New Deal aren’t just possible in North Carolina, but urgent and necessary. Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Erica ❤️ Erica Smith for U.S. Senate Email us: mailto: info@ericaforus.com

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: SB 1 is headed to Governor Abbott’s desk.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
Voter suppression has passed in Texas.

A moment ago, both houses of the state legislature passed the final
version of SB 1, the bill designed to subvert democracy and keep hundreds
of thousands of Texans from participating in our elections.

I want to be very candid about what this means for our democracy now that
the bill is on its way to Governor Abbott’s desk.

Once signed, we’ll have three months before this law goes into effect,
meaning if Congress and President Biden don’t move quickly to pass voting
rights legislation that would override this bill, Republicans will be
allowed to cement their power in Texas while skirting accountability for
this state’s 57,000 COVID deaths, the power grid failures that have killed
over 700 Texans, our place as the most uninsured state in the nation, and
a slew of other failures that continue to threaten our health, safety, and
livelihoods.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46879?refcode=ema20210831-151834&t=1001&akid=151834%2E444211%2Es8u0If ]As we confront this new phase of the fight to save voting rights in
Texas, please consider chipping in $3 or whatever you can to
support Powered by People’s work to push Congress and President Biden to
pass voting protections that can save our democracy and restore our
ability to elect leaders who truly represent the people of this state.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46879?refcode=ema20210831-151834&amount=3&t=1020&akid=151834%2E444211%2Es8u0If ]Contribute $3

Here’s what gives me hope that we can get this done:

In the effort to stop this voter suppression bill, Texans have shown the
nation the level of courage and tenacity that it’s going to take to stop
this slide and save our democracy before it’s too late. Because of the
support of people like you, we’ve been able to hold some of the largest
voting rights rallies that this state has seen in decades, engage the
conscience of the nation, lead the democratic response to the
authoritarian threat prompted by the Big Lie, and take this fight to the
one place it can be won: our nation’s capital.

And while we push at the federal level, Powered by People will continue to
spend every day working to register new voters, host phone banks and
in-person canvasses in Texas counties that are often neglected, and do
everything we can to bring more people into our democracy so that we can
build a better, more responsive government in this state.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46879?refcode=ema20210831-151834&t=1021&akid=151834%2E444211%2Es8u0If ]We won’t be able to win this fight without people like you. By joining
this effort and making a donation to Powered by People, you’ll help us
continue to give this fight everything we’ve got.

Always grateful to be in this fight with you,

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46879?refcode=ema20210831-151834&t=1022&akid=151834%2E444211%2Es8u0If ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=151834%2E444211%2Es8u0If

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

name: John Fetterman
subject: Let me explain, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Supporting our campaign today is so incredibly important right now.
#
Peter,
With just a few hours left before our August fundraising deadline, [**_let me explain why supporting our campaign with a $5 donation is the *most* important thing you can do to help our campaign right now._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29622?refcode=em20210831-2479&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2479%2E434096%2EqG1c-L)
I’ll just start out with something I think about every day:
All eyes will be on the Keystone State in November 2022. **This Senate seat is gonna be a real toss-up, so saving our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority could all come down to Pennsylvania.**
And don’t just take my word for it. CNN has consistently rated Pennsylvania as the #1 Most Likely to Flip Democratic state in the country. We all remember what happened when Pennsylvania flipped _the other way_ in 2016. That’s why building support for the long road ahead is so critical right now.
Then there’s the latest polling, Peter. According to the data we’ve seen so far, voters overwhelmingly see our campaign as the ONLY campaign that can win statewide in Pennsylvania. That’s the kind of momentum we’ve gotta keep up during this early period.
After all, the pool of Democratic primary competitors we’re up against is bigger than it’s ever been. Now, I’m the *only* candidate who has run statewide before and won — but your support today helps ensure that our campaign stays ahead of our competition.
**Peter, here is my solemn pledge to you:**
Send me to the U.S. Senate, and I will *always* act with conviction and vote in favor of progress for the working families of our country.
Send me to the U.S. Senate, and I will be the 51st Democratic YES vote on urgent changes, like raising the minimum wage to at least $15 and abolishing the filibuster.
**Send me to the U.S. Senate, and I will be a leader for ALL Pennsylvanians.** No one taken for granted. No one left behind.
But I truly cannot get there without a lot of help from online supporters like you, Peter.
That’s why I’m humbly and respectfully asking one last time before our critical August fundraising deadline at midnight:
[**_Will you please make your very first $5 donation to our campaign today? We’re SO CLOSE to meeting our goal of raising $84,172 directly into the Flip Pennsylvania Fund — and we only have until midnight to get it done._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29622?refcode=em20210831-2479&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2479%2E434096%2EqG1c-L)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29622?refcode=em20210831-2479&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2479%2E434096%2EqG1c-L)**
On behalf of me, Gisele, the kids, and our entire campaign, THANK YOU for your continued support! We can only do this together. 🙏
Have a great night,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

clean_body: Supporting our campaign today is so incredibly important right now. Peter, With just a few hours left before our August fundraising deadline, I’ll just start out with something I think about every day: All eyes will be on the Keystone State in November 2022. This Senate seat is gonna be a real toss-up, so saving our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority could all come down to Pennsylvania. And don’t just take my word for it. CNN has consistently rated Pennsylvania as the #1 Most Likely to Flip Democratic state in the country. We all remember what happened when Pennsylvania flipped the other way in 2016. That’s why building support for the long road ahead is so critical right now. Then there’s the latest polling, Peter. According to the data we’ve seen so far, voters overwhelmingly see our campaign as the ONLY campaign that can win statewide in Pennsylvania. That’s the kind of momentum we’ve gotta keep up during this early period. After all, the pool of Democratic primary competitors we’re up against is bigger than it’s ever been. Now, I’m the only candidate who has run statewide before and won — but your support today helps ensure that our campaign stays ahead of our competition. Peter, here is my solemn pledge to you: Send me to the U.S. Senate, and I will always act with conviction and vote in favor of progress for the working families of our country. Send me to the U.S. Senate, and I will be the 51st Democratic YES vote on urgent changes, like raising the minimum wage to at least $15 and abolishing the filibuster. Send me to the U.S. Senate, and I will be a leader for ALL Pennsylvanians. No one taken for granted. No one left behind. But I truly cannot get there without a lot of help from online supporters like you, Peter. That’s why I’m humbly and respectfully asking one last time before our critical August fundraising deadline at midnight: On behalf of me, Gisele, the kids, and our entire campaign, THANK YOU for your continued support! We can only do this together. 🙏 Have a great night, John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Team AOC
subject: Why your $14.77 is so important right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Grassroots donors put her in Congress, and grassroots donors keep her there.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210831-2485-header&t=1&akid=2485%2E2526796%2EBrfE95)
With just hours before our midnight fundraising deadline, we wanted to share a sneak peek into our ActBlue fundraising:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210831-1?refcode=em20210831-2485-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2485_2526796_BrfE95&akid=2485%2E2526796%2EBrfE95)
**That’s our average contribution during the month of August.** Our grassroots movement is built on thousands of individuals like you pitching in $14.77 or whatever you can afford, whenever you can. And the fact that we’re able to raise as much as we do just one $14.77 donation at a time is a testament to the size and strength of the movement we’ve been building since Alexandria’s election in 2018.
**Grassroots donors put her in Congress, and grassroots donors _keep_ her there.** Your support made it possible for Alexandria to introduce the Green New Deal, fight for an infrastructure package and budget resolution that meets the moment, and so much more.
**But our next test is raising $120,000 before the end of the month.** It’s been a slower fundraising pace than we expected in August. But if we can reach that goal, we’ll be in good shape to fund the work we had already planned to support AOC’s re-election and work in Congress.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210831-1?refcode=em20210831-2485-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2485_2526796_BrfE95&akid=2485%2E2526796%2EBrfE95)
We divided up what we need to raise and our typical contribution size. If we can get just three more people from your area to chip in, we’ll hit our goal before midnight. [What do you say? Can you make a $14.77 donation — or whatever you can afford — now to be one of the three supporters from your area?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210831-1?refcode=em20210831-2485-P_FND_EOM_GOL&t=4&refcode2=2485_2526796_BrfE95&akid=2485%2E2526796%2EBrfE95)
**[Contribute $14.77](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210831-1?refcode=em20210831-2485-P_FND_EOM_GOL&t=23&refcode2=2485_2526796_BrfE95&akid=2485%2E2526796%2EBrfE95)**
Thank you for everything you do to sustain our movement.
\- Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210831-1?refcode=em20210831-2485-P_FND_EOM_GOL&t=24&refcode2=2485_2526796_BrfE95&akid=2485%2E2526796%2EBrfE95)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210831-2485-P_FND_EOM_GOL&t=25&akid=2485%2E2526796%2EBrfE95)**

name: Jacob Wynn
subject: For a brighter future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Young Politician Committee PAC
body:
We must stand together to ensure American values are the same values held by the youth of our nation. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3a96857b8c8b424ca4e087bfba1f11e5&_e=AOgBVuT8IKNFpYIe8KN_3jhDWoSjPvgao8fiJajPRU-PJaaL8ti6C0YvtC1woGby9jBG1R1_HFqB_-HW6qiqkAB7_jbSENBN1if7PcggQl6blIuByveWoBPTzfDx2ez-jTS5QU5KWxFTQ6ijQNopRbzEnkybZN4YfV9-hacQOYU1bixMzn53kx9sqvqsr6pTcIlxFLZmFqxMUIdA2HZD0892oga6lvNV7eRs_9zzOe-xprzyoiZyz9CBXaYeJCZxPYxb_MxEI1GN_pWS6n4UVr82afnaq37jU0oR2A8iCTqxjYGUijqWbalj5nETlbHlXqZ1HYbfvmlbndym3Gt_EQ6rh3zwcT-MyXCB5uurs5Rlu8tNJb2AIXBObGqWDaiUgKkyyUnBsTn7TqbU25hFKM8u9e-vDgMu1_6HOz8BTF2sXlckJIDtAP-7KSnSzxQo2SL9V12xQavZoqQDx2GLVg%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

I was once told that “everything is political” and for a time, I didn’t think that included the youth of America. These days, all you have to do is scroll through social media, observe the classrooms, stream music, and countless other channels of communication where kids are bombarded with political agendas on a daily basis.

Political groups, especially left-wing organizations, know that the future of this nation and the direction it moves politically is in the hands of our youth. **I’m telling you right now: if we don’t start educating the youth about real American Values, the only people to blame for a second-rate America will be us.**

When kids know more about celebrities than our own constitution, you know something needs to change. We must take action, and we have to do it **NOW!** [**Are you willing to help better our nation and support our efforts to ensure America has a brighter future than what we’re seeing today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3a96857b8c8b424ca4e087bfba1f11e5&_e=AOgBVuT8IKNFpYIe8KN_3jhDWoSjPvgao8fiJajPRU-PJaaL8ti6C0YvtC1woGby9jBG1R1_HFqB_-HW6qiqkAB7_jbSENBN1if7PcggQl6blIuByveWoBPTzfDx2ez-jTS5QU5KWxFTQ6ijQNopRbzEnkybZN4YfV9-hacQOYU1bixMzn53kx9sqvqsr6pTcIlxFLZmFqxMUIdA2HZD0892oga6lvNV7eRs_9zzOe-xprzyoiZyz9CBXaYeJCZxegtgiAuAfJVRsOA41x7dRm8RZyIk6oIs0JZkKfGFsOSuQAkRTszRLaVghiamTo-kT8UpDDmWOk2EwtsOSyoXDhbPrJdbKkDpZlA6YtdCMIPOVzCWEfuQusqEIMiDeuRhBTitgGKQTAr6YRE1I3mi07lUqNyg5upEzrq1ZL-YKYJ1CrlWCzdSrXTahp-UMXRA_8xuk7hqrfOpL5DeWrpVaw%3D%3D)

[** HELP US TO BETTER AMERICA **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3a96857b8c8b424ca4e087bfba1f11e5&_e=AOgBVuT8IKNFpYIe8KN_3jhDWoSjPvgao8fiJajPRU-PJaaL8ti6C0YvtC1woGby9jBG1R1_HFqB_-HW6qiqkAB7_jbSENBN1if7PcggQl6blIuByveWoBPTzfDx2ez-jTS5QU5KWxFTQ6ijQNopRbzEnkybZN4YfV9-hacQOYU1bixMzn53kx9sqvqsr6pTcIlxFLZmFqxMUIdA2HZD0892oga6lvNV7eRs_9zzOe-xprzyoiZyz9CBXaYeJCZxGjVSmgXOJaJiX5i5jvWritk1X1pGERhIU4JfqCQyx6sIQ00zAuHRQ9uYgNzJTj_cstN5SfYFu172t7e2X9hO3rfIRiJGFEv1XJZ7MUcm7KYtI3oUbpzhOalzBQpHStNxrSZ2Sjskgay8EgUI56nULpxLb6ue1Pc-xmvlY1-wE4YAnQZQ1dOmESyX1OtevXJeVy6J7DKLCspX8WZX4D-TZA%3D%3D)
**We need young Americans who want to put our country and our communities first over any political agenda. We need elected officials who care more about bettering our nation and serving the people instead of bowing to the whims of special interests.**

All of those things start with the youth of this country and the new generation of elected officials. We need to make sure that bettering America is the top priority, serving the people is unquestionable, and fighting for American values is second nature.

If you believe as I do, that Americans deserve better than a gridlocked Congress, and deserve better than politicians who care more about fame than about the people they’re supposed to be serving, [**then help us elect the right patriots for the job so we can ensure an America that we both can be proud of.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3a96857b8c8b424ca4e087bfba1f11e5&_e=AOgBVuT8IKNFpYIe8KN_3jhDWoSjPvgao8fiJajPRU-PJaaL8ti6C0YvtC1woGby9jBG1R1_HFqB_-HW6qiqkAB7_jbSENBN1if7PcggQl6blIuByveWoBPTzfDx2ez-jTS5QU5KWxFTQ6ijQNopRbzEnkybZN4YfV9-hacQOYU1bixMzn53kx9sqvqsr6pTcIlxFLZmFqxMUIdA2HZD0892oga6lvNV7eRs_9zzOe-xprzyoiZyz9CBXaYeJCZxkyEnctqa-ekoLRC60l2HUuQfzGasEU0YHmexlg19iHekGTe1ocEme75NWgF7QI2bhMXLO175hWQF3Upjg8SixTYMntDktpLy9vi4FvUH-17u4k1xAYSXc8nh5G_LeRdWDYcffJE3jrwZMQFywwCGU620aEUexVh7Jbcbw7zDAzO_sML_vWHqg5ubc-pVkANNZa2NIxoOD_Qgb_tHGvv7cg%3D%3D)

For America,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3a96857b8c8b424ca4e087bfba1f11e5&_e=AOgBVuT8IKNFpYIe8KN_3jhDWoSjPvgao8fiJajPRU-PJaaL8ti6C0YvtC1woGby9jBG1R1_HFqB_-HW6qiqkAB7_jbSENBN1if7PcggQl6blIuByveWoBPTzfDx2ez-jTS5QU5KWxFTQ6ijQNopRbzEnkybZN4YfV9-hacQOYU1bixMzn53kx9sqvqsr6pTcIlxFLZmFqxMUIdA2HZD0892oga6lvNV7eRs_9zzOe-xprzyoiZyz9CBXaYeJCZx4Ktx66JgcZg7TMbfaLu07KarQjKKPrkcxbhMA1NMy7UgCmyLvIV7OO2pW2-v4X0UeZzoGHm_0uiLYP-wr-POax0y-z1QlZXmt3i3FhK5DWGCoD_vTqD9cPkEwXNjlp2RsAVIArPX-cR3SUMNMMC7igQGa37You-MQfz1GIasjBLPG2mcCaxJsVYDRTNdZQ35AZnQ5GdinyFdT7liIk3ghg%3D%3D)
**Jacob Wynn**
Chairman, Young Politician Committee

[** HELP US TO BETTER AMERICA **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3a96857b8c8b424ca4e087bfba1f11e5&_e=AOgBVuT8IKNFpYIe8KN_3jhDWoSjPvgao8fiJajPRU-PJaaL8ti6C0YvtC1woGby9jBG1R1_HFqB_-HW6qiqkAB7_jbSENBN1if7PcggQl6blIuByveWoBPTzfDx2ez-jTS5QU5KWxFTQ6ijQNopRbzEnkybZN4YfV9-hacQOYU1bixMzn53kx9sqvqsr6pTcIlxFLZmFqxMUIdA2HZD0892oga6lvNV7eRs_9zzOe-xprzyoiZyz9CBXaYeJCZxmVS_CfNB05n-fBNv57EBwe7VARte56Ox88AZNeAFKbmOhOd2f9sGxv7GmcL53Nb63kcdPOAuOxW60eCS9OXviY9DaBAWhY65W6vi5r45PXTYaN0aDae19Tj1mQmLEhfl670YoFM2F9Ou0jSpF71NGuvp6rZWW-chPdw2AmKqnFt6JMimMqIZALkXMMqsVnHv0-JUYc0aQTqtrGFNjuhe_Q%3D%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: The Commander-in-Chief is compromised
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Biden's incompetence costs American lives |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=99f70a6a3c&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

In 27 years in the Army, I saluted the Commander-in-Chief.

But this C-in-C either has no idea what is going on around him which demands use of the 25th Amendment to remove his executive authority, or he has committed crimes on par with a standard that demands impeachment.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=20598d1634&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who refuses to criticize Biden. He is weak and vulnerable, just like Biden!**

It is becoming clear that,. one way or another, Biden is compromised.

This week, 13 young servicemen and women gave their lives to defend our citizens trapped in Afghanistan because of Biden's follies. They deserve to be remembered and honored.

Instead, Biden's Democrats try to meekly defend his incompetence and deadly confusion.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d771b8715e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Even this weekend, with the bodies of the dead soldiers returning home, Biden couldn't be bothered. He was checking his watch in the ultimate act of disrespect.

Townhall reports:

_President Joe Biden and First Lady Jill Biden were at the Dover Air Force Base Sunday morning for the dignified transfer of 11 of the 13 service members who lost their lives on Thursday. While there, the president actually checked his watch. And he wasn't subtle about it, not even close to it._

Biden doesn't care about those he killed. As for me, I say, _Rest in peace, heroes.

Here they are:

For the Marine Corps, the deceased are:

Marine Corps Staff Sgt. Darin T. Hoover, 31, of Salt Lake City, Utah.

Marine Corps Sgt. Johanny Rosariopichardo, 25, of Lawrence, Massachusetts.

Marine Corps Sgt. Nicole L. Gee, 23, of Sacramento, California.

Marine Corps Cpl. Hunter Lopez, 22, of Indio, California.

Marine Corps Cpl. Daegan W. Page, 23, of Omaha, Nebraska.

Marine Corps Cpl. Humberto A. Sanchez, 22, of Logansport, Indiana.

Marine Corps Lance Cpl. David L. Espinoza, 20, of Rio Bravo, Texas.

Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Jared M. Schmitz, 20, of St. Charles, Missouri.

Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Rylee J. McCollum, 20, of Jackson, Wyoming.

Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Dylan R. Merola, 20, of Rancho Cucamonga, California.

Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Kareem M. Nikoui, 20, of Norco, California.

Staff Sergeant Darin T. Hoover, Cpl. Hunter Lopez, Cpl. Daegan W. Page, Cpl. Humberto A. Sanchez, Lance Cpl. Jared M. Schmitz, Lance Cpl. David L. Espinoza, Lance Cpl. Rylee J. McCollum, Lance Cpl. Dylan R. Merola, and Lance Cpl. Kareem M. Nikoui were assigned to 2nd Battalion, 1st Marine Regiment, 1st Marine Division, I Marine Expeditionary Force, Camp Pendleton, California._

Everyone in our country should be remembering their names today, and every other day!

No, they were not famous, but they should be. They should be honored as the heroes that they were. Serving at a dangerous and dusty airport in Afghanistan, while folks like you and I sit in the lap of luxury.

_**God bless our protectors. Always. **_
---
|
---
| **The Washington Examiner reports that one of the mothers of the dead Marines puts the blame squarely on Biden:**

_The mother of one of the slain Marines in Kabul last week said that people who voted for Joe Biden are responsible for her son's death._

_Kathy McCollum, mother of 20-year-old U.S. Marine Rylee, who was killed in the suicide bombings in Kabul along with 12 other service members, said on SiriusXM radio that “dementia-ridden” Biden is to blame for her son's death along with all who supported him.

“Twenty years and six-months-old, getting ready to go home from freaking Jordan to be home with his wife to watch the birth of his son, and that feckless, dementia-ridden piece of crap just sent my son to die,” McCollum said in the radio interview with host Andrew Wilkow on “The Wilkow Majority” show._

Biden's incompetence will go down in history. He's the worst President we ever had, and he should be impeached for what he's done.

_Here's my thing: I will hold Biden and his sycophants accountable. I will vote to impeach and investigate his corrupt regime. Democrat Darren Soto will not._

The American people have had enough and want him to be challenged. I will do that, as a part of the oath I took to the Constitution!

The Dems control all of the Federal government right now. We need to change Congress to hold Biden accountable! [Help me put a check and balance on Biden and Pelosi!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=13760fc9b5&e=afa21b7626)

[Will you help me win my congressional seat](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e2dc5e8ac2&e=afa21b7626)? I got more votes here than any Republican ever had. It's a red-trending seat in a red-trending state! Now is the time!

Biden will destroy this country entirely if we don't stop him. Help me stand up to "Joke Biden"!

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b0bf2a23d8&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=fcccc4db46&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a4d2ad24da&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e6ed6c6a93&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
We're going to miss our August fundraising goal unless we're able to come up with the additional money by midnight tonight. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. |
---
Peter.

I was just as shocked as anyone else when my Democrat opponent outraised my campaign in the 2nd quarter. It's not something that I'm open to letting happen again in the 3rd quarter. **While we've got another month to make sure that doesn't happen, our success in August is paramount if we're going to come out on top.**

Well, as you know today is the last day of August and here at my campaign office we're all a bit on edge. I just looked at our donation dashboard and to hit our August fundraising goal we need to raise another $2,538 before MIDNIGHT.

**[Can I count on you, Peter to help me and my team reach our August goal?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=60e395f978ba4f2fa8d35d5410039f91&_e=8crErvxcRcHh0RkYMJjIk8b_V0pzcxj4jX33To86mZZcgg4F23RZ0Sq71fJNZFP8p0hWt6OWuFzgBv028J0tuPsnu4yBlkpdlQ31fSoFjXzLZCd2iz86OaH08wPP1eWa_KxJv736IsVZCdc6__EX4l81-zpNDBBPYFLXgGP6OzjT0Ko6p8r3QHge6EbaOECfPLwR0qst09qfZfx0SrzK09vR1IS6hzCPmFs4qM5xlGJELIXvHJVMQp_7ALY1omQsacIkxCmsKPM-S9EJnf6XzhsNTzsZ6FCkDLiM2GRXFwackZq8zTc5abdbCNXP3U2nvmRkYi3_Xqy2YcS34ntRA2OYLb9i4l3-8gWVLnIk4Or-Y5ul8wz9u6fW-jzQuuPkVOQfPTQaLF5fXbNG7A0eORuRY6lRBmdieBKpsGk6imT-_tokTbkK8TBPz2Em9vga)**

If somehow I get outraised once again this quarter, I'm afraid that there will be grave implications beyond my campaign. Politically ambitious Republicans in Oregon might even take the opporutnity to jump into this race, creating a contentious primary which we cannot afford to have if we're going to win this district and take back the House.

**We can't lose the momentum that we've built since launching this campaign, because _this_ race will win Republicans back control of the House.**

clean_body: We're going to miss our August fundraising goal unless we're able to come up with the additional money by midnight tonight. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter. I was just as shocked as anyone else when my Democrat opponent outraised my campaign in the 2nd quarter. It's not something that I'm open to letting happen again in the 3rd quarter. While we've got another month to make sure that doesn't happen, our success in August is paramount if we're going to come out on top. Well, as you know today is the last day of August and here at my campaign office we're all a bit on edge. I just looked at our donation dashboard and to hit our August fundraising goal we need to raise another $2,538 before MIDNIGHT. | PLEASE CHIP-IN STATUS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com: PENDING If somehow I get outraised once again this quarter, I'm afraid that there will be grave implications beyond my campaign. Politically ambitious Republicans in Oregon might even take the opporutnity to jump into this race, creating a contentious primary which we cannot afford to have if we're going to win this district and take back the House. We can't lose the momentum that we've built since launching this campaign, because this race will win Republicans back control of the House. Thanks for your help. Respectfully, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: Chairman Rick Scott
subject: We’ve got one day to raise $30k
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Unlike President Biden, I know where the buck stops. When the Senate majority is the question at hand, for Republicans, the buck stops with me. We can |
---
Peter,

I know my team has been emailing you frequently during the month of August, and now with less than one day left until the end of August fundraising period, I wanted to reach out to you myself.

Unlike President Biden, I know where the buck stops. When the Senate majority is the question at hand, for Republicans, the buck stops with me. We cannot fail to deliver a Republican Senate majority next November.

Democrats have proven time and again - most recently last month - that they’re determined to keep their majority so they can continue tearing apart the country bit by bit.

**[Of course, I don’t want to have to deal with the repercussions of failing to win the one seat that it will take to flip the chamber RED and put Democrats back into the minority where they belong. But let me tell you this now: even flipping one seat isn’t going to be an easy task](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e434d1af802a44b8b80666b8a0226a3e&_e=ez0T9mqS-Lnmiq8tynXVe-aWKtXiY8DQOpCWDgIQ5eFMUK8YpBy6yfyJEP8Dqdi4L33AAhIcJVQv6yyRwA3Owo18A-b4El9RzMjpNzgEX2F9Hbcz1D2yfZe88mBGNWfu_CoBH6zuEGo9Okg0vyJK8964u5aqT4gZuncGiP9EPHr_enw6YvMbHDt2EGHDpSTXwC1BbVrPC78DNSVq8Fe81dSPOF8aZyuQ0VrKKdxQhmvje_GQ_GnBX32Iit9Bjp1L_oCemAnsA6PSKHIdBxPHP3paIy6260hBEGiDV3qEQYmUsDQmt3__vEioJfOZqcQJGsMwWlAfE6MVVRlHaZLzaLCzeqiXEuKpeYLrKVTleH_hCGrXXvU5QxTZLAcUFKkkbUZtMzl_DRbcAWvr5bnM1RfVuc_uCF7Yja_o2was1tF4zuSiLA_ATdBzL5-PASFGlGhIIJ9rEc7Wu9UCyWV4zQ%3D%3D)**.

**[That’s why I’m asking you to help me ensure that the Senate Republicans meet our August goal. As it stands this morning, we’re just $30k short.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e434d1af802a44b8b80666b8a0226a3e&_e=ez0T9mqS-Lnmiq8tynXVe-aWKtXiY8DQOpCWDgIQ5eFMUK8YpBy6yfyJEP8Dqdi4L33AAhIcJVQv6yyRwA3Owo18A-b4El9RzMjpNzgEX2F9Hbcz1D2yfZe88mBGNWfu_CoBH6zuEGo9Okg0vyJK8964u5aqT4gZuncGiP9EPHr_enw6YvMbHDt2EGHDpSTXwC1BbVrPC78DNSVq8Fe81dSPOF8aZyuQ0VrKKdxQhmvje_GQ_GnBX32Iit9Bjp1L0pe9NfziWwiBMKSpBhOJld83pq0UudwDzLLa2wvkH-8ViN1qgRF7hklZRogExGGlg5b3tMS8wOL8ldlk-t0WVL6cVSgGV5QQhVu8wc_54dfhl38oCezU6f_ujKX5Z0NBEWXGEbJ-cXH52ZG_RZA2D2GdMA_QldKSc62z6UGzoFsbHpmik8Q8QodpI372NOBsPMNjWClwRrkmYAjc4N5uLQ%3D%3D)**

| **EMERGENCY END-OF-MONTH DONATION REQUEST FOR**
**We need you to chip-in $5 right now if you can. Help us save the country by flipping the senate**

[**CHIP-IN $5 ->**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e434d1af802a44b8b80666b8a0226a3e&_e=ez0T9mqS-Lnmiq8tynXVe-aWKtXiY8DQOpCWDgIQ5eFMUK8YpBy6yfyJEP8Dqdi4L33AAhIcJVQv6yyRwA3Owo18A-b4El9RzMjpNzgEX2F9Hbcz1D2yfZe88mBGNWfu_CoBH6zuEGo9Okg0vyJK8964u5aqT4gZuncGiP9EPHr_enw6YvMbHDt2EGHDpSTXwC1BbVrPC78DNSVq8Fe81dSPOF8aZyuQ0VrKKdxQhmvje_GQ_GnBX32Iit9Bjp1L2YnVyVZ1s9O0rnWa87rnkJfpQptxEhIsYviif4cQ_0lRffCsoETvfdZMy4ccu7MrRFfRtaT5PbszchuYT3NVk_Rb9iZuW7p9H9skXSlaX815V8mS24g-UvUGQMVV3egvhg9J3dYe5c9TBzkvsoaziPgBYh0M6qlMqLZ5sqiQW96RlP8SZIhM6wzzo_Bzr07lX7eiwtd4duynXaMNlkJGYA%3D%3D)

---

Every Republican Senator is counting on you to help us reach our August fundraising goal, **[so I implore you one last time to please pitch in whatever you can.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e434d1af802a44b8b80666b8a0226a3e&_e=ez0T9mqS-Lnmiq8tynXVe-aWKtXiY8DQOpCWDgIQ5eFMUK8YpBy6yfyJEP8Dqdi4L33AAhIcJVQv6yyRwA3Owo18A-b4El9RzMjpNzgEX2F9Hbcz1D2yfZe88mBGNWfu_CoBH6zuEGo9Okg0vyJK8964u5aqT4gZuncGiP9EPHr_enw6YvMbHDt2EGHDpSTXwC1BbVrPC78DNSVq8Fe81dSPOF8aZyuQ0VrKKdxQhmvje_GQ_GnBX32Iit9Bjp1LlUOMjHB3eI_WlAeb7ZdXOCoNrm2Rwfzhw03lyphQTyERrwaNf_lQ2RfN-VU3Ao7_pM6yURNckCapSMyqYmOI8_5Gycgth5NopIJ7HX8Gj2PnG1sZop0XJg-G5434GltwD253bWbzQbg7v48mTjfvrLRIyrEAfFtKZZsyPJM-D-ciE867vZ7WYINBlS2gqPlFGHwhH4FMgnmT60hZU_uq9A%3D%3D)**

August has shown all of us that Democrats simply aren’t fit to govern. Now, help us give them the boot.

Senator Rick Scott

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: my last note of the night:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | I know you've heard from me and my team quite a bit over the past few days, but I promise this is my last note of the night.

I'll be frank with you: ****[My team just compiled my final finance update of the month, and the numbers aren't looking good.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-)****

As it stands, we're still $25,000 short of our must-hit goal with just 150 minutes left before my deadline.

If we fail to close this gap before my midnight deadline, Republicans will be closer than EVER before to defeating our House Majority.

So since you're one of my top grassroots supporters, I'm making one last, personal appeal directly to you:

**Can you please rush in $25 before midnight to help defend my House Democrats and close my End of Month budget gap?**

| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Chip in $1 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-q2P~)**

**[Chip in $35 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)**

**[Chip in $50 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/6dzecpP3~)**

**[Chip in $100 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/9b46T4dz8rh~)**

**[Chip in $250 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-)**

**[Or chip in another amount>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/rr9Yf7E~)**

Thank you,

Nancy
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45548512&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4MDA1ODc4NgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45548512&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4MDA1ODc4NgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’m running
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58229741:JWM5NT2pN:m:1:3253819041:6C7B5C219B64CDA22A63997E4A26603D:r)

---
Peter,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58229741:JWM5NT2pN:m:1:3253819041:6C7B5C219B64CDA22A63997E4A26603D:r)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58229741:JWM5NT2pN:m:1:3253819041:6C7B5C219B64CDA22A63997E4A26603D:r)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58229741:JWM5NT2pN:m:1:3253819041:6C7B5C219B64CDA22A63997E4A26603D:r)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58229741:JWM5NT2pN:m:1:3253819041:6C7B5C219B64CDA22A63997E4A26603D:r)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58229741:JWM5NT2pN:m:1:3253819041:6C7B5C219B64CDA22A63997E4A26603D:r)
Herschel Walker

P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. **[Please help my campaign get off to a critically important start by donating $10, $20, or even $50 today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58229741:JWM5NT2pN:m:1:3253819041:6C7B5C219B64CDA22A63997E4A26603D:r)** Thank you.

[** CHIP IN NOW -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58229741:JWM5NT2pN:m:1:3253819041:6C7B5C219B64CDA22A63997E4A26603D:r)

[
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58229742:JWM5NT2pN:m:1:3253819041:6C7B5C219B64CDA22A63997E4A26603D:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

body:
I need you.
[](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJyNkctu5CAQRb_GvcMyYMBZeNEPRfMXFi7KbSKDHR4T9d8HO53RbCJFKrE4dbn1Mj2DjgGcbM8aRpuXhjaibZmsaS2ovF745cp4dxbifK7a5sP62qxeL-Ythey2GlZ3mvuWNyNvOqZGCmrUrVIvrKMGTMe0akGeln5OaYsVP1fstUREyAHrYhfQ7CY703-RaIfBgiZvq_WJTNmboG20_k6KyNmUEIv0qE2mgEjihggzMTihNxgq_qrdmn2q-E00FZM5ucGhsdkVgk7bZZinJ49rDoCFOxi8LvHkoN2m7d2XzLGUjtPh55KRLDp7mAcXtoDRGvTp_x0N-2DPub4LrD7h0eMuTDjA9gjxq4HBL9aUDIjbu_zznq5fMB7QCDoZUIJQqShpgRsyCjUSyfQ4SUMFRTiF3mwfdllslKrc7L4PfRyqjLXY6dFX6lIxlnOxZOy4CfuN8S5m1_Kmx4b_fj5N62O3O1W3TzPgwVk)

Friend,

The time has come.

For too long, the Fake News media and liberal Big Tech companies have SILENCED me and other conservative Americans with no repercussions.

They have done whatever they want to WHOEVER they want, and it's time we fight back.

I'm putting together an elite group of supporters who will be known as the **[Trump Free Speech Defenders,](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJyNkU2P2yAQhn-Nc8MyYMA9-JBkd1X13LtFmCFmZbDFx27z74vdtOqlUqURh2de3vmCkZmBGXNyI-sY7b50tBN9z2RLW0Hl9cIvV8aHsxDnc9N3ny60sAa9wHuOxW-tWf1pHu3Qcw4gmRKdQm2YFFqbDiW1PUfA0zLOOW-p4eeGvdVIaErEttpFhN1kZ_oDifYYndHkfXUhE1sCRO2SC3dSRd7ljFilR21iIyJJG6KZCaDFABgb_qb9WkJu-IvoGiZL9pNHcMVXgl67ZZrtk6e1RIOVezMFXePJjfabdvdQM8dSBk6nf5dMZNElmHnycYuYHGDIf-9o2gd7zvW7wBoyHj3uwoyT2R4x_WpgCouDmnk1w1f17fvrj3zAdEAQ1IJRglCpKOkNB3IT6kYk0zcrgQqK5hRH2D7dsrgkVb3ZfR_6OFQda3H2MTbq0jBWSrVk7LgJ-x_jXcyu9c2PDf_8fJq2x253ql5-ApY-wfM)** and I'm counting on YOU to be the very FIRST Patriot to join.

subject: Biden screwed up big time
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58229924:6f0wTT2NB:m:1:3253819041:17E1FC604DF7B857402A553C752D0CB7:r)
---
|
Peter,
Have you seen that famous video going around of CNN on the ground in Afghanistan?
**A reporter walking through the streets of Afghanistan, now flooded with Taliban terrorists, had this to say about our country: "Death to America."**
The current leadership of our great nation is failing us, and the media is helping them, all to the detriment of American national security.
Compare this to their coverage of any Trump rally, where they paint anybody supporting President Trump as an evil, angry, domestic terrorist.
**[This is exactly why I launched my new LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND to take on the mainstream media and big tech.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58229924:6f0wTT2NB:m:1:3253819041:17E1FC604DF7B857402A553C752D0CB7:r)**
| | | | [>> CHIP IN TO MY LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND TODAY <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58229924:6f0wTT2NB:m:1:3253819041:17E1FC604DF7B857402A553C752D0CB7:r)
---

You see, my life was flipped upside down when I joined up with Devin Nunes to expose the deep state plot to take down President Donald Trump through the Russia collusion hoax.

**I helped pen the memo that exposed the expected shady figures, like Hillary Clinton, as being behind what was ultimately a coup attempt to overthrow Trump 's presidency.**

In response, the media turned all their guns on me, smearing my good name in sensational hit pieces.

So now I'm suing them, **[with a lawsuit against CNN for $50 million](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58229924:6f0wTT2NB:m:1:3253819041:17E1FC604DF7B857402A553C752D0CB7:r)** , and others in the works, including lawsuits on behalf of other Americans who have been lied about by the media.

If that is you, feel free to reach out and I may be able to help.

**[And please consider chipping in to support my LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND to ensure we have the funds to take on the fake news media, and big tech oligarchs who believe they run the world.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58229924:6f0wTT2NB:m:1:3253819041:17E1FC604DF7B857402A553C752D0CB7:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58229924:6f0wTT2NB:m:1:3253819041:17E1FC604DF7B857402A553C752D0CB7:r)

| | | [Chip in $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58229925:6f0wTT2NB:m:1:3253819041:17E1FC604DF7B857402A553C752D0CB7:r)
---

| | | [Chip in $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58229924:6f0wTT2NB:m:1:3253819041:17E1FC604DF7B857402A553C752D0CB7:r)

---

Why is it that the Taliban can have a Twitter account, but President Donald Trump can't?

That is one of many questions I hope to answer.

Together we can hold these anti-American traitors accountable.

**[So please make a generous contribution to my LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND without delay!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58229924:6f0wTT2NB:m:1:3253819041:17E1FC604DF7B857402A553C752D0CB7:r)**

Thanks in advance for your support!

Yours in the fight for truth,

Kash Patel
Former Senior Trump Advisor

name: RightUSA on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Independence without compromise
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58230011:JB6SkT2Nt:m:1:3253819041:A114B734304B90F69D7787EF3F1A5644:r) Dear Peter,
Too many American colleges and universities are failing to equip their students with the knowledge and character required for a good and happy life--much less for useful citizenship.
And they are failing to do these things while receiving billions of your tax dollars in the process!
There are many reasons for the sorry state of American higher education today. Not the least of them is the financial entanglement of our colleges and universities with the federal government--an entanglement that goes back now over 60 years.
By accepting tax dollars over these many decades, colleges and universities have also had to accept the corrupting and unconstitutional regulations attached to those dollars. **It has proved a devil 's bargain.**
Hillsdale College has rejected this bargain: we refuse to accept ONE PENNY of federal or state government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
**With your support, the College****stands as a beacon of genuine independence in American higher education --free of regulations about what students to enroll, what professors to hire, and how or what to teach.**
**** **This independence allows Hillsdale to remain true to its 177-year-old-mission: to provide "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty." **
The resulting contrast between Hillsdale and the vast majority of other American colleges and universities could not be greater.

* **Hillsdale teaches that there is a right and a wrong way to live** , while most other colleges and universities promote moral and cultural relativism.
* **Hillsdale teaches that America has a great heritage of liberty** , while other colleges and universities increasingly promote the false narrative of America as essentially unjust and irredeemable.
* **Hillsdale upholds the American tradition of free and civil speech and debate** , while too many other colleges and universities enforce the deadening dictates of political correctness.

**Hillsdale College remains true to its original mission on behalf of liberty not only on its southern Michigan campus, but also nationwide through its many educational outreach initiatives.**
But this work is only possible with the ongoing support of informed patriots, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. [**That 's why today, I hope you will consider making a tax-deductible gift toward our 2021 Annual Fund.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58230011:JB6SkT2Nt:m:1:3253819041:A114B734304B90F69D7787EF3F1A5644:r)
**What does the Annual Fund support?**
First, it replaces all federal and state student aid with privately funded student aid so that the best and most deserving students can attend Hillsdale College.
The cost of replacing federal and state student grants and loans over the past 36 years exceeds $130 million. It will cost the College more than $5 million this year alone.
The Annual Fund also makes possible Hillsdale's extensive educational outreach efforts nationwide, **reaching** and **teaching** additional millions each year on behalf of liberty. These outreach efforts include:

* **_Imprimis_** , Hillsdale's digest of liberty--over**5.7 million households and businesses** receive _Imprimis_ , free of charge, ten times each year.
* **Hillsdale 's free online courses **on topics including the Constitution, American history, and free market economics--over **2.5 million citizens** have already enrolled in one or more of these courses.
* **Hillsdale 's K-12 education programs,** including the**Barney Charter School Initiative,** which founds and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide--currently, there are**over 20 Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 schools operating in over eleven states.**

**** Hillsdale also **provides an American classical curriculum****-- including American civics--to a growing network of educators and homeschoolers**; these materials are provided free of charge as part of Hillsdale's educational mission on behalf of liberty.
In 1844, the founders of Hillsdale College--like the founders of America before them--acted on the belief that education is the surest way to maintain liberty and free government.
In the same belief, Hillsdale College continues to expand its educational outreach efforts.**[This is why I hope you'll consider supporting Hillsdale College with a special gift to its Annual Fund today. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58230011:JB6SkT2Nt:m:1:3253819041:A114B734304B90F69D7787EF3F1A5644:r)**
But it seems clear to us today that Hillsdale's educational mission on behalf of liberty has never been more urgently needed.
The far-Left is pulling out all the stops in its open and aggressive efforts to undermine informed patriotism and transform our government and our American way of life.
**We must engage these forces with equal strength and determination. That 's why we need your support today. **
No matter the size of the gift, your support will ensure Hillsdale's independence, help increase the reach of _Imprimis_ and Hillsdale's free online courses, and help provide increasing thousands of K-12 students an American classical education (including American civics).
**If you agree that it is vital for Hillsdale College to remain a beacon of independence in American higher education --and to continue to reach and teach additional millions on behalf of liberty--I hope you will make your best tax-deductible gift toward our ambitious Annual Fund goal today. **
I've provided a secure link for you here:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/price-of-independence](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58230011:JB6SkT2Nt:m:1:3253819041:A114B734304B90F69D7787EF3F1A5644:r)**
With your help, Hillsdale will maintain its independence without compromise and will increase and expand its work on behalf of American liberty for years to come.
Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to hearing from you before the end of our fiscal year on June 30.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Hillsdale College's refusal to accept taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans--frees it from the corrupting and unconstitutional regulations that burden and compromise other colleges and universities.
The resulting independence ensures that Hillsdale can remain true to its 1844 mission: to provide "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."
Also, because of this independence, your support is critical to Hillsdale's work.
So please, if possible, give your best tax-deductible Annual Fund gift today using the secure link below. Your response is vital as we build our budget for the next academic year and engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education through 2021 and into the crucial year of 2022.
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/price-of-independence](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58230011:JB6SkT2Nt:m:1:3253819041:A114B734304B90F69D7787EF3F1A5644:r)**

And they are failing to do these things while receiving billions of your tax dollars in the process! There are many reasons for the sorry state of American higher education today. Not the least of them is the financial entanglement of our colleges and universities with the federal government--an entanglement that goes back now over 60 years. By accepting tax dollars over these many decades, colleges and universities have also had to accept the corrupting and unconstitutional regulations attached to those dollars. It has proved a devil 's bargain. Hillsdale College has rejected this bargain: we refuse to accept ONE PENNY of federal or state government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. With your support, the Collegestands as a beacon of genuine independence in American higher education --free of regulations about what students to enroll, what professors to hire, and how or what to teach. ** This independence allows Hillsdale to remain true to its 177-year-old-mission: to provide "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty." The resulting contrast between Hillsdale and the vast majority of other American colleges and universities could not be greater. Hillsdale teaches that there is a right and a wrong way to live , while most other colleges and universities promote moral and cultural relativism. Hillsdale teaches that America has a great heritage of liberty , while other colleges and universities increasingly promote the false narrative of America as essentially unjust and irredeemable. Hillsdale upholds the American tradition of free and civil speech and debate , while too many other colleges and universities enforce the deadening dictates of political correctness. Hillsdale College remains true to its original mission on behalf of liberty not only on its southern Michigan campus, but also nationwide through its many educational outreach initiatives. But this work is only possible with the ongoing support of informed patriots, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. What does the Annual Fund support? First, it replaces all federal and state student aid with privately funded student aid so that the best and most deserving students can attend Hillsdale College. The cost of replacing federal and state student grants and loans over the past 36 years exceeds $130 million. It will cost the College more than $5 million this year alone. The Annual Fund also makes possible Hillsdale's extensive educational outreach efforts nationwide, reaching and teaching additional millions each year on behalf of liberty. These outreach efforts include: Imprimis , Hillsdale's digest of liberty--over5.7 million households and businesses receive Imprimis , free of charge, ten times each year. Hillsdale 's free online courses on topics including the Constitution, American history, and free market economics--over 2.5 million citizens have already enrolled in one or more of these courses. Hillsdale 's K-12 education programs, including theBarney Charter School Initiative, which founds and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide--currently, there areover 20 Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 schools operating in over eleven states. Hillsdale also provides an American classical curriculum**-- including American civics--to a growing network of educators and homeschoolers; these materials are provided free of charge as part of Hillsdale's educational mission on behalf of liberty. In 1844, the founders of Hillsdale College--like the founders of America before them--acted on the belief that education is the surest way to maintain liberty and free government. In the same belief, Hillsdale College continues to expand its educational outreach efforts. But it seems clear to us today that Hillsdale's educational mission on behalf of liberty has never been more urgently needed. The far-Left is pulling out all the stops in its open and aggressive efforts to undermine informed patriotism and transform our government and our American way of life. We must engage these forces with equal strength and determination. That 's why we need your support today. No matter the size of the gift, your support will ensure Hillsdale's independence, help increase the reach of Imprimis and Hillsdale's free online courses, and help provide increasing thousands of K-12 students an American classical education (including American civics). If you agree that it is vital for Hillsdale College to remain a beacon of independence in American higher education --and to continue to reach and teach additional millions on behalf of liberty--I hope you will make your best tax-deductible gift toward our ambitious Annual Fund goal today. I've provided a secure link for you here: With your help, Hillsdale will maintain its independence without compromise and will increase and expand its work on behalf of American liberty for years to come. Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to hearing from you before the end of our fiscal year on June 30. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Hillsdale College's refusal to accept taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans--frees it from the corrupting and unconstitutional regulations that burden and compromise other colleges and universities. The resulting independence ensures that Hillsdale can remain true to its 1844 mission: to provide "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty." Also, because of this independence, your support is critical to Hillsdale's work. So please, if possible, give your best tax-deductible Annual Fund gift today using the secure link below. Your response is vital as we build our budget for the next academic year and engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education through 2021 and into the crucial year of 2022. name: Greater Georgia
subject: GREATER GEORGIA ANNOUNCES RED BELT BLITZ TO REGISTER, ENGAGE VOTERS IN NORTH METRO ATLANTA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, SEPT. 1, 2021
GREATER GEORGIA ANNOUNCES RED BELT BLITZ TO REGISTER, ENGAGE VOTERS IN NORTH METRO ATLANTA
ATLANTA - Today, Greater Georgia is launching the Red Belt Blitz campaign to register and mobilize voters in North Metro Atlanta. This grassroots campaign is a six-figure outreach and mobilization effort targeting five counties in the North Atlanta "Red Belt": Cherokee, Hall, Forsyth, Bartow, and Floyd. As part of the campaign, Greater Georgia will register new voters and reach disengaged and disenfranchised voters via door-knocking, text and direct mail, volunteer recruitment, digital advertising, and outreach events.
"Greater Georgia's Red Belt Blitz is an important step in reaching new and existing voters who feel left out, unheard, and disengaged," said Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. "We are focusing intently on engaging the thousands of unregistered, right-leaning Georgians across the Red Belt, whose voices are critical to helping our state and country move in a positive direction. This is just one component of our statewide effort to register, engage and mobilize voters ahead of 2022 and beyond, while also defending election integrity in our state."
BY THE NUMBERS
The five Red Belt counties comprise over 10 percent of the conservative vote in recent statewide elections, making registration and engagement in this region crucial to Georgia's future. Cherokee and Forsyth County were also two of the fastest growing counties in the entire state, according to recently released 2020 census data.
Overall, Greater Georgia will make nearly 100,000 voter contacts in the Red Belt to reach:

* 80,000 unregistered, conservative-leaning voters
* 30,000 inactive and disenfranchised right-leaning voters who feel that their votes do not matter - a significant portion of the 339,000 disenfranchised voters statewide who voted in November 2020 but didn't vote in January 2021.

subject: A force for good
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Jay Jones
body:
| | | **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/pXwgskzK_7jMgaUjJrCanPW-RZBEXdPtIEosAQbDo2w=/nnvT8UuZUkE0q2Qde00BXyZI9_LbBduOMDMEv19O5ms=)**
---
Friend -- When Nancy Guy was elected to the House of Delegates in 2019, she beat a 10-year, entrenched Republican by only 40 votes and became a part of the new Democratic majority. Now, she's up against a radical, right-wing gun shop owner and she's got one of the toughest races of the cycle -- [**she needs our support today!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pXwgskzK_7jMgaUjJrCanPW-RZBEXdPtIEosAQbDo2w=/Pinn0a7c82OSg7KdTKJ_xzABpt8MIAenjvhMqAtzaIY=) Nancy was raised in Hampton Roads and served on the Virginia Beach School Board before being elected Delegate. She serves on the Courts of Justice committee -- an unusual assignment for a freshman legislator -- and she's been a force for good in that committee room every step of the way. She helped lead the charge to legalize marijuana, abolish the death penalty, and transform our justice system in Virginia. She's the kind of passionate, progressive leader that we need more of in Richmond; not less. [**Please join me in donating $5, $25, or whatever you 're able to support her campaign.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pXwgskzK_7jMgaUjJrCanPW-RZBEXdPtIEosAQbDo2w=/Pinn0a7c82OSg7KdTKJ_xzABpt8MIAenjvhMqAtzaIY=) There is more work to be done here in Virginia, but we have got to protect our Democratic majority. The path to protecting that majority runs through the 83rd District in Hampton Roads. [**Let 's work together to get Nancy back to the General Assembly today!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pXwgskzK_7jMgaUjJrCanPW-RZBEXdPtIEosAQbDo2w=/Pinn0a7c82OSg7KdTKJ_xzABpt8MIAenjvhMqAtzaIY=) \- Jay _P.S. body:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231022:JaT0AT22N:m:1:3253819041:27CC9764E4233780370E38C85E05BF78:r)
Peter,

Did you watch my latest video message? This is what a LEGITIMATE president looks like.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231022:JaT0AT22N:m:1:3253819041:27CC9764E4233780370E38C85E05BF78:r)

In a time when Joe Biden is completely failing our great Country, I knew I needed to speak directly to YOU, the American People.

As one Nation, we are mourning the loss of our brave service members due to the barbaric terrorist attack in Afghanistan. These noble American warriors laid down their lives in the line of duty, racing against time to rescue their fellow citizens. They are heroes.

This tragedy should have never taken place. It should NOT have happened, and it would not have happened if I were your President. I promise you that I will never stop fighting to Save America from Joe Biden's disastrous administration.

**[Please add your name to publicly stand with me as I work to Save America.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231022:JaT0AT22N:m:1:3253819041:27CC9764E4233780370E38C85E05BF78:r)**

[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231022:JaT0AT22N:m:1:3253819041:27CC9764E4233780370E38C85E05BF78:r)

Thank you,

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: UPDATE: We're suing Twitter and we need your help
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231495:6NDBCT2Nn:m:1:3253819041:57A7C7FCC2A3ED45C6F11E85E229C528:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we 've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231495:6NDBCT2Nn:m:1:3253819041:57A7C7FCC2A3ED45C6F11E85E229C528:r)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231495:6NDBCT2Nn:m:1:3253819041:57A7C7FCC2A3ED45C6F11E85E229C528:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231495:6NDBCT2Nn:m:1:3253819041:57A7C7FCC2A3ED45C6F11E85E229C528:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231495:6NDBCT2Nn:m:1:3253819041:57A7C7FCC2A3ED45C6F11E85E229C528:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _Hopefully, I don 't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment. _ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231495:6NDBCT2Nn:m:1:3253819041:57A7C7FCC2A3ED45C6F11E85E229C528:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231495:6NDBCT2Nn:m:1:3253819041:57A7C7FCC2A3ED45C6F11E85E229C528:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231495:6NDBCT2Nn:m:1:3253819041:57A7C7FCC2A3ED45C6F11E85E229C528:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today's left. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes--out of school--during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we 're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. ** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231495:6NDBCT2Nn:m:1:3253819041:57A7C7FCC2A3ED45C6F11E85E229C528:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231495:6NDBCT2Nn:m:1:3253819041:57A7C7FCC2A3ED45C6F11E85E229C528:r) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231495:6NDBCT2Nn:m:1:3253819041:57A7C7FCC2A3ED45C6F11E85E229C528:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231495:6NDBCT2Nn:m:1:3253819041:57A7C7FCC2A3ED45C6F11E85E229C528:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231495:6NDBCT2Nn:m:1:3253819041:57A7C7FCC2A3ED45C6F11E85E229C528:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231495:6NDBCT2Nn:m:1:3253819041:57A7C7FCC2A3ED45C6F11E85E229C528:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58231496:6NDBCT2Nn:m:1:3253819041:57A7C7FCC2A3ED45C6F11E85E229C528:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I Endorse Joe Kent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00130UEoLBQW9pG4N6Az1yZKlZuYQCfSOkUc3Jmxfs_wOG5cYpgsFUlQi9KrDQAflxlo814ZxdiOM1UElX_6Z9JzxBsXoI76IWOqnTimK8f9S1kZX6RHBsJrXSg4XRpSnz19I03tH134UTNoJHUO_lsaFH4Yx9kG34A&c=LdS5Cv8vJYFgSSdXdSkcZ-LtufgkT9AmYO76xplXNVovuZz3Gg-JDQ==&ch=zoockdBwz0e7lSInA-22nHhyYEZ4x2hvvNrKAcGpLSAya60aHas7aA==)

| Peter,
---
| Since I was elected to the US Congress, I've consistently stood for America First Values: building the wall and securing our border, opposing amnesty for illegals, opposing our endless foreign wars, and defending all of the progress that President Trump achieved during his historic presidency.
But I cannot do it alone. I need allies. And in this battle for the future of our country, I've found in Joe Kent someone the America First movement can count on and whom I want on my side in the fight against Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden, and the corporate-owned RINOs in Washington.
Joe's opponent has an "R" next to her name but may as well be a Democrat. She voted to impeach President Trump, voted to stop the construction of the border wall, voted for amnesty, voted to tie President Trump's hands when he wanted to deploy the National Guard to defend our cities against ANTIFA, and has voted again and again for endless wars abroad.
But the future of our party and our country does not belong to her. It belongs to a new generation of leadership, and in the vanguard of that leadership is Joe Kent.
I am honored to give this eleven-tour combat veteran, this gold star husband, this father, and this patriot, Joe Kent, my full endorsement.
I am contributing the maximum amount allowable to Joe's campaign, and I ask that you do the same so that Joe can join me in the trenches in Washington DC in our common struggle to save our great nation.
---
| | |

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter, | Since I was elected to the US Congress, I've consistently stood for America First Values: building the wall and securing our border, opposing amnesty for illegals, opposing our endless foreign wars, and defending all of the progress that President Trump achieved during his historic presidency. But I cannot do it alone. I need allies. And in this battle for the future of our country, I've found in Joe Kent someone the America First movement can count on and whom I want on my side in the fight against Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden, and the corporate-owned RINOs in Washington. Joe's opponent has an "R" next to her name but may as well be a Democrat. She voted to impeach President Trump, voted to stop the construction of the border wall, voted for amnesty, voted to tie President Trump's hands when he wanted to deploy the National Guard to defend our cities against ANTIFA, and has voted again and again for endless wars abroad. But the future of our party and our country does not belong to her. It belongs to a new generation of leadership, and in the vanguard of that leadership is Joe Kent. I am honored to give this eleven-tour combat veteran, this gold star husband, this father, and this patriot, Joe Kent, my full endorsement. I am contributing the maximum amount allowable to Joe's campaign, and I ask that you do the same so that Joe can join me in the trenches in Washington DC in our common struggle to save our great nation. | | | | | | == | Sincerely, | == | Matt Gaetz | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2021 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. Terry’s opponent isn’t just proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement; he supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories about the 2020 election.
