This is not just about electing Terry; it’s also about sending a message to the entire country that candidates who oppose reproductive rights and voting rights -- and who spread Donald Trump’s big lie -- will lose.

_**[Please, donate to Terry’s campaign right now and become a part of his historic movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35038318/303849979/-2023814932?refcode=20210901.2_SA_9B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmY0MTE0OS0zNTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2CE2jDy9UIwvt_JYlDVuOfwf-6X24cLoIZ5qxDG0Zpo=)**_

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: The Violent College Left
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left 's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America 's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America 's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58233706:6W5BlT2NQ:m:1:3253819041:DB378222F821DF81280C82CECABF10D4:r)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D 'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, **Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O 'Keefe, **NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America 's Foundation._ _That 's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF 's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58233706:6W5BlT2NQ:m:1:3253819041:DB378222F821DF81280C82CECABF10D4:r) Peter, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America 's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58233706:6W5BlT2NQ:m:1:3253819041:DB378222F821DF81280C82CECABF10D4:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58233706:6W5BlT2NQ:m:1:3253819041:DB378222F821DF81280C82CECABF10D4:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58233706:6W5BlT2NQ:m:1:3253819041:DB378222F821DF81280C82CECABF10D4:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58233707:6W5BlT2NQ:m:1:3253819041:DB378222F821DF81280C82CECABF10D4:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58233708:6W5BlT2NQ:m:1:3253819041:DB378222F821DF81280C82CECABF10D4:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58233709:6W5BlT2NQ:m:1:3253819041:DB378222F821DF81280C82CECABF10D4:r)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58233710:6W5BlT2NQ:m:1:3253819041:DB378222F821DF81280C82CECABF10D4:r)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro | | | | ---|---|--- 11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor Reston, VA 20191-1556 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Roe v. Wade effectively overturned – unless we act now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=wbhT2%2BBHudM%2BfK4oGc3QWQxRoZ%2BNaErU&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
I have disturbing and urgent news to share - and I'm counting on you to take action like never before:
**Today, because the Supreme Court failed to intervene, the Texas GOP 's extremist new abortion law goes into effect - and _Roe v. Wade_ will effectively have been overturned. The stakes couldn't be higher for women in Texas and across the country.**
Texas' radical and unconstitutional law will:
* Ban abortion beyond six weeks of pregnancy - before most women can know or even be aware that they _are_ pregnant.
* Create a vigilante justice system that allows **anyone in the _entire country_** to personally sue Texas health clinics, doctors, nurses, clinic administrators - just about anyone who helps a woman exercise her constitutional reproductive rights. Including a friend or family member who drives her to the clinic or gives her financial assistance. And each of these individuals can be sued for $10,000 and legal expenses.

There is a clear-cut pathway at the federal level that could have blocked this extremist legislation in Texas and prevent anything like it from taking hold across the country:
That's the Women's Health Protection Act, a bill I introduced, which would guarantee a woman's right to make her own reproductive healthcare decisions. **This new law would enshrine a woman 's right to choose at the federal level - and ensure it's protected, no matter what the courts or right-wing state lawmakers try to do.**
Friend, it is no exaggeration to say that we are on the precipice of a monstrous violation of fundamental human rights if this Texas anti-women law survives its legal challenges and remains in effect. **That 's why I am once again asking 2,500 members of this team to sign on to my petition to protect women's reproductive health. Time is of the essence, so please add your name immediately.**
**[Sign on now to urge Congress to pass the Women's Health Protection Act so we can defend women's reproductive health.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-dobbs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1070-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-trump-crimes%3Fcode%3Djtk1070-su-nd)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-dobbs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1070-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-trump-crimes%3Fcode%3Djtk1070-su-nd)
If we do nothing, Texas is only the beginning. Our country could return to dark days where every single woman's personal decision about when to have a child is controlled by the government - back to the days where abortion care was driven underground and made unsafe.
As we've seen with GOP-led attacks on voting rights, when extremist laws take hold in one state, they can spread like wildfire to others. Texas' sickening new maneuver will be a model for anti-choice legislators across the country, and that's why action at the federal level to block these extremist laws is so necessary.
I will fight with everything I have to prevent that from happening, but I need you to help me pass this vital legislation through Congress. **[Please, can I count on you to sign my petition now urging Congress to pass the Women's Health Protection Act? I'm counting on 2,500 team members to sign on before midnight to protect abortion access.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-dobbs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1070-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-trump-crimes%3Fcode%3Djtk1070-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=L%2BoTRc1vmjf%2FEDv48fMhdQxRoZ%2BNaErU&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Team Herring
subject: 🚨 BREAKING: It’s neck and neck
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ONE COMMONWEALTH PAC
body:
Monmouth University just released its latest poll showing Mark only TWO POINTS ahead of his dangerous right-wing opponent Jason Miyares. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35039167/303852743/-1309710229?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2NhNGRmMi0zOTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0oGIX_57XmgSDB4uj42Ypb-k_DwAbsypcDjf1-K2pzk=&emci=617f2312-320b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=e3ca4df2-390b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=9499186) | Team, **BREAKING NEWS: Monmouth University just released its latest poll showing Mark only TWO POINTS ahead of his dangerous right-wing opponent Jason Miyares.** That’s within the polling margin of error and means the race for Attorney General is statistically tied. We can’t take Virginia for granted, friends. Monmouth University is respected for its polling, and it’s clear that Mark is in a tight race. We need your help to keep reaching voters across the Commonwealth with his message and we need to do it fast. name: Dr Neil Shah
subject: State Fair Message on Health Freedom
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Dr
body:
| Peter, Fear. The government and the media want you to be afraid. The more scared you are, the more freedom they can steal. Turn on the news at night, and you would be fearful to leave the comforts of your home without the false safety of a mask. **Fortunately, hundreds of thousands of Minnesotans aren't buying the media’s lies - they’re living their lives by attending the Great Minnesota Get-Together. And we're there every day to tell them about how to protect their freedoms!** Not only that, they are also showing up at rallies across Minnesota. Last Saturday, over 3,000 patriots came to the State Capitol to fight to Stop Vaccine Mandates and preserve health freedom. I was honored to speak at the event. I entered the race for Governor to **Save Minnesota from career politicians** who continue to fail you and me when it comes to preserving freedom. If we keep running the same kinds of candidates, running the same playbook, Walz and company will continue to win. Minnesota can't afford four more years of tyranny. Do you agree? Our message at the State Fair is about standing up to the radical left and career politicians who want to destroy Minnesota and America. From dedicated life-long conservatives to the newly ‘red-pilled’, we’re hearing from so many of you: we must stand up against the destruction of our state and our freedoms. **We aim to beat Tim Walz in November of 2022. He****must be****a one term Governor. But I’m afraid many great Minnesotans can’t wait until then to settle the score. They’ll be losing their jobs soon.** So I plan to do my part to take this message of health freedom around the state of Minnesota as well as every day at the Minnesota State Fair. People need to see doctors like me stand up for liberty and actual science, not political science. And while a fence goes up around Tim Walz’ office at the State Capitol, I’m going directly to the people he’s afraid to meet face-to-face: the people from “rocks and cows” territory. I’d love to debate Tim Walz in public on the science around COVID - do you think he’d accept the challenge? Our campaign is unique and different. We are going to play by a different playbook. Donations for this campaign come from ‘We the People’; not lobbyists and Special Interests like the career politician candidates. To be successful, we must continue building from the ground up.
**Help us continue going around the state of Minnesota to promote health freedom and build a winning team to FIRE WALZ with a**[**contribution today**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_fair_health_freedom&n=1). | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_fair_health_freedom&n=2 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_fair_health_freedom&n=2)
---
Career politicians are clearly not the answer to Saving Minnesota. It’s time we have an outsider who is willing to fight and win for once!
Join me in spreading the message of health freedom across the state of Minnesota. Let’s stand up against the forced mandates of masks and vaccines. And let’s remove Governor Walz from office once and for all.
[**Please help me spread health freedom across the state and get rid of Tim Walz with a contribution of $25, $50 or $100 today.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_fair_health_freedom&n=3)**I truly appreciate your support. We can’t win this battle without you!**
Sincerely,
Dr. Neil Shah
Conservative Candidate for Governor
[http://www.electneil.com/](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=5JezZIIJQQrVuUtHI_sfDKYjXcFcnny7CTruXj7gH44&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_fair_health_freedom&n=4)

clean_body: | Peter, Fear. The government and the media want you to be afraid. The more scared you are, the more freedom they can steal. Turn on the news at night, and you would be fearful to leave the comforts of your home without the false safety of a mask. Fortunately, hundreds of thousands of Minnesotans aren't buying the media’s lies - they’re living their lives by attending the Great Minnesota Get-Together. And we're there every day to tell them about how to protect their freedoms! Not only that, they are also showing up at rallies across Minnesota. Last Saturday, over 3,000 patriots came to the State Capitol to fight to Stop Vaccine Mandates and preserve health freedom. I was honored to speak at the event. I entered the race for Governor to Save Minnesota from career politicians who continue to fail you and me when it comes to preserving freedom. If we keep running the same kinds of candidates, running the same playbook, Walz and company will continue to win. Minnesota can't afford four more years of tyranny. Do you agree? Our message at the State Fair is about standing up to the radical left and career politicians who want to destroy Minnesota and America. From dedicated life-long conservatives to the newly ‘red-pilled’, we’re hearing from so many of you: we must stand up against the destruction of our state and our freedoms. We aim to beat Tim Walz in November of 2022. Hemust bea one term Governor. But I’m afraid many great Minnesotans can’t wait until then to settle the score. They’ll be losing their jobs soon. So I plan to do my part to take this message of health freedom around the state of Minnesota as well as every day at the Minnesota State Fair. People need to see doctors like me stand up for liberty and actual science, not political science. And while a fence goes up around Tim Walz’ office at the State Capitol, I’m going directly to the people he’s afraid to meet face-to-face: the people from “rocks and cows” territory. I’d love to debate Tim Walz in public on the science around COVID - do you think he’d accept the challenge? Our campaign is unique and different. We are going to play by a different playbook. Donations for this campaign come from ‘We the People’; not lobbyists and Special Interests like the career politician candidates. To be successful, we must continue building from the ground up. Help us continue going around the state of Minnesota to promote health freedom and build a winning team to FIRE WALZ with a. | "DONATE" Career politicians are clearly not the answer to Saving Minnesota. It’s time we have an outsider who is willing to fight and win for once! Join me in spreading the message of health freedom across the state of Minnesota. Let’s stand up against the forced mandates of masks and vaccines. And let’s remove Governor Walz from office once and for all. truly appreciate your support. We can’t win this battle without you! Sincerely, Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor Prepared and paid for by the Dr. Neil Shah for Governor Committee, 855 Village Center Dr #245, North Oaks, MN 55127 -=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · United States

**Ron DeSantis asks Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade**
_The Tampa Bay Times_ , July 29, 2021

**Most extreme abortion law in US takes effect in Texas**
_The Guardian_ , September 1, 2021
Friend,

When the U.S. Supreme Court handed down Roe v. Wade in 1973, they were making a clear declaration: _a woman’s body belongs to her._

Ever since, the right to self-determination has been under relentless siege by abortion opponents -- last night, **the Supreme Court failed to act and now Texas’ extreme anti-choice law is in effect. Gov. DeSantis is in full support.**

**[Will you rush a donation to my campaign today to support a governor who will demand that the Supreme Court protect a woman’s right to choose?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35049943/303875849/-1901457658?refcode=20210901_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjFmNzdkNS00ODBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p_ufRsXTHBnM2PPK9v4dbMSd5rIhKxCNi1QFxzLf-J0=)**

Let me be crystal clear: Every woman deserves the ability to decide what to do with her own body. End of discussion. But we all know Gov. DeSantis won’t protect a woman’s right to choose; in fact, _he’s already signed laws restricting abortion access in Florida._

That’s antithetical to my beliefs. As Florida’s 44th governor, I vetoed an anti-choice bill, and in Congress, I voted against a 20-week abortion ban. As your next governor, I will continue to defend reproductive rights -- no matter what.

You have my word.

I cannot be silent on this. **[Donate today to help me defeat Gov. DeSantis and uphold Roe v. Wade.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35049945/303875850/-1901457658?refcode=20210901_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjFmNzdkNS00ODBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p_ufRsXTHBnM2PPK9v4dbMSd5rIhKxCNi1QFxzLf-J0=)**

\-- Charlie Crist

Folks, **Passed during the last legislative session, Texas Republicans' dangerous permitless carry law will officially go into effect today.** _House Bill 1927_ will make it easier for people to access guns without a permit or background check — including criminals and domestic terrorists. Law enforcement officials and gun safety advocates, like Moms Demand Action, from all across the state have been absolutely clear: permitless carry puts officers in harm's way and makes our communities and schools more dangerous. This bill is nothing more than an act of political theatre for which Texans shall pay the price. Once again, instead of focusing on the real issues facing Texans — like our failing energy grid, public education, and healthcare — Dan Patrick is working to ensure that bad actors can now legally carry dangerous weapons in our state. **These are not our Texas values. clean_body: | Folks, Passed during the last legislative session, Texas Republicans' dangerous permitless carry law will officially go into effect today. House Bill 1927 will make it easier for people to access guns without a permit or background check — including criminals and domestic terrorists. Law enforcement officials and gun safety advocates, like Moms Demand Action, from all across the state have been absolutely clear: permitless carry puts officers in harm's way and makes our communities and schools more dangerous. This bill is nothing more than an act of political theatre for which Texans shall pay the price. Once again, instead of focusing on the real issues facing Texans — like our failing energy grid, public education, and healthcare — Dan Patrick is working to ensure that bad actors can now legally carry dangerous weapons in our state. These are not our Texas values. Will you donate $10 or any amount to help us flip Texas blue so we can invest in a future we can be proud of? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for all you do. We will work harder than ever to hold them accountable and beat ‘em. Team Collier The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Re: Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
In the dark of night, the right-wing Supreme Court allowed the country’s most dangerous anti-abortion legislation to go into effect by doing nothing to block it.

Texas’ restrictive law will effectively ban abortions after six weeks (before most people even know they’re pregnant), allow a $10,000 cash bounty on _anyone_ who helps someone get an abortion, and unravel _Roe v. Wade_ in the state. It’s cruel, dangerous, and a grim harbinger of what’s to come -- but Texas is just the tip of the iceberg.

**Since _Roe v. Wade_ became the law of the land nearly 50 years ago, anti-choice Republicans have been hellbent on rolling back reproductive rights.** This year alone, nearly 600 restrictive abortion bills have been introduced in 47 states, including right here in Wisconsin.

We must defend _Roe v. Wade_ and reproductive freedom from right-wing attacks. If we don’t, the cost will be people’s lives -- especially low-income folks and people of color. So, here’s what I’m asking you to do right now:

**[Will you add a donation to support organizations fighting to defend access to safe, legal abortion? Your contribution will benefit the Texas Equal Access Fund, the Lilith Fund, Clinic Access Support Network, and more. I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t so urgent.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35052884/303882011/249631543?gpsid=50_130_20323&refcode=em21_210901_TXAbr_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210901_TXAbr_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjYxOGZhYS00ZTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2h8oAfPNL9SdlZKfkm1DuKch99-sHQKzj0lm38vG3_I=)**
| [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35052885/303882012/249631543?gpsid=50_130_20323&refcode=em21_210901_TXAbr_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210901_TXAbr_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjYxOGZhYS00ZTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2h8oAfPNL9SdlZKfkm1DuKch99-sHQKzj0lm38vG3_I=)
---

**Let’s be clear about this:_Roe v. Wade_ did not mark the beginning of people getting abortions. It marked the end of them dying from unsafe abortions.** That’s why an overwhelming majority of Americans support it.

Everyone should be able to make their own decisions about their health and their body, and that includes abortion. We’re finding ourselves in dark and dangerous times with this latest attack on reproductive rights -- but together, we will fight this.

As your next U.S. Senator, I will never back down in the fight for reproductive freedom.

Thank you for taking action.

— Sarah

clean_body: In the dark of night, the right-wing Supreme Court allowed the country’s most dangerous anti-abortion legislation to go into effect by doing nothing to block it. Texas’ restrictive law will effectively ban abortions after six weeks (before most people even know they’re pregnant), allow a $10,000 cash bounty on anyone who helps someone get an abortion, and unravel Roe v. Wade in the state. It’s cruel, dangerous, and a grim harbinger of what’s to come -- but Texas is just the tip of the iceberg. Since Roe v. Wade became the law of the land nearly 50 years ago, anti-choice Republicans have been hellbent on rolling back reproductive rights. This year alone, nearly 600 restrictive abortion bills have been introduced in 47 states, including right here in Wisconsin. We must defend Roe v. Wade and reproductive freedom from right-wing attacks. If we don’t, the cost will be people’s lives -- especially low-income folks and people of color. So, here’s what I’m asking you to do right now: = | = Let’s be clear about this:Roe v. Wade did not mark the beginning of people getting abortions. It marked the end of them dying from unsafe abortions. That’s why an overwhelming majority of Americans support it. Everyone should be able to make their own decisions about their health and their body, and that includes abortion. We’re finding ourselves in dark and dangerous times with this latest attack on reproductive rights -- but together, we will fight this. As your next U.S. Senator, I will never back down in the fight for reproductive freedom. Thank you for taking action. — Sarah = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

body:
His behavior is even more disturbing than we realized.
#
Madison Cawthorn’s behavior is even more disturbing than we realized — and **he has the full backing of the GOP behind him.**
First, he repeatedly lied about a "rigged election."
Then, he promised "bloodshed" and "to take up arms."
**Now, he’s threatened President Biden and Vice President Harris:**
_"I will remove Joe Biden from office, and then when Kamala Harris inevitably screws up, we will take them down, one at a time." — Rep. Madison Cawthorn (NC-11)_
[__](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13135?refcode=em20210901-404&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=404%2E3698%2EmnmR9U)
Here’s the bottom line:
**If we don’t build broad support behind Erica Smith and our progressive Democratic campaign, this highly-competitive U.S. Senate seat could fall to a MAGA insurrectionist nominee of the North Carolina GOP’s choosing.**
We simply can’t afford to let that happen.
[**_Can you please rush a donation of $5 or more to help our campaign build the coalition of voters it takes to win statewide? Donating is the single most important way to directly help Erica Smith and our campaign._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13135?refcode=em20210901-404&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=404%2E3698%2EmnmR9U)

name: Team Durbin
subject: Donald Trump’s Big Lie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
To this day, despite it all, former President Trump continues to spread his Big Lie.
#
Peter,
We all know that former President Donald Trump was virtually unhinged after the 2020 election, flailing in every direction, every lawsuit or court challenge he could file, to try to push his Big Lie.
To this day, despite it all, former President Trump continues to spread his Big Lie -- that the 2020 election was stolen from him. This dangerous untruth led to the deadly January 6 attacks.

subject: Defending reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
While the Court sits by and allows this law to take effect, we need to fight back. As your Senator, I will always fight for your constitutional reproductive rights. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35054228/303886910/112948214?refcode=EM_PET_210901choice_N_AL_90DA_7_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Njc4ZTNjNC01MTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vPAkUcBixK8RstwUOHa9uJ9jCx8EFqJJUj7JxanB2ig=)

Peter,

Last night, the Supreme Court allowed the most restrictive anti-abortion law to take effect in Texas. This law amounts to a nearly complete ban on abortion, and paves the way for other Republican legislatures to enact similar laws.

While the Court sits by and allows this law to take effect, we need to fight back. As your Senator, I will always fight for your constitutional reproductive rights.

Women’s reproductive choices should be between a woman and their doctor. I’m asking you to add your name to my petition to show your support for a women’s right to choose.

**[I’m asking you to add your name right now to our petition to tell the Supreme Court and Republicans like Ron Johnson to keep their hands off women’s health care.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35054229/303886911/762101790?refcode=EM_PET_210901choice_N_AL_90DA_7_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Njc4ZTNjNC01MTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vPAkUcBixK8RstwUOHa9uJ9jCx8EFqJJUj7JxanB2ig=&emci=0f90e6f5-460b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=5678e3c4-510b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18659600)** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35054230/303886912/762101790?refcode=EM_PET_210901choice_N_AL_90DA_7_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Njc4ZTNjNC01MTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vPAkUcBixK8RstwUOHa9uJ9jCx8EFqJJUj7JxanB2ig=&emci=0f90e6f5-460b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=5678e3c4-510b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18659600)** As your Senator, I will continue to protect every woman’s right to autonomy over her own body and ensure that women have full control of their health care choices.

The conservative Supreme Court has already begun chipping away at _Roe v. Wade_ , and that’s why it's urgent that we double down on our efforts to protect it.

**[Add your name to demand that we ensure women have control of their own health choices.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35054231/303886913/762101790?refcode=EM_PET_210901choice_N_AL_90DA_7_NG_N_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Njc4ZTNjNC01MTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vPAkUcBixK8RstwUOHa9uJ9jCx8EFqJJUj7JxanB2ig=&emci=0f90e6f5-460b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=5678e3c4-510b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18659600)**

Thank you,

Alex Lasry

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=852371a9ab1c4c75a1f6b9fa4504c22b&_e=Fx0ua2KdGm9p8Ba2n1kco6Kn3NXLDBTMLTVWaSGWTDnmwZ44JeMrGaf9ij6ejbO9H-Z5WFCzcmi8-rzmP9Rad2I8-dRLu7j_iVsjnF2zkiI7hWiIEGRs_ciqdthObOwqJ9pJ_Z7HE7_FYmp_Yr2ezZ6TiwFJdyB-NRnYp6JVOZEG5ICtb2lfGz1Su5pc1dDZ1teeDfpS-2g9ZZk8JBcPfs3Sho603KgBiRC4u5MAwFgONgmAiC-TW1Qr4BLYTfmMJKiJWMCb_MMNKZFRUljObED7Iy34ndRxGonUjVsmllw9CjYflZXRQ7Qa1wuKGuzpX7t3wBONgtIuRpdblcEYXO8OQZMc2vcvOvr28dTdhRSTnKqIfDYdVHCFPJtwPj8xTD6SBrJ-upkCOgZVxdMhnLDMyZF6v4VJs9VDPssVsx0Ry85qwiLlXA3URYpDa5h9BGJ3rkbjKcMZIVR5Gym7vMUVvWsYbOto8KTXchETAsQ%3D)

Peter,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Peter, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=852371a9ab1c4c75a1f6b9fa4504c22b&_e=Fx0ua2KdGm9p8Ba2n1kco6Kn3NXLDBTMLTVWaSGWTDnmwZ44JeMrGaf9ij6ejbO9H-Z5WFCzcmi8-rzmP9Rad2I8-dRLu7j_iVsjnF2zkiI7hWiIEGRs_ciqdthObOwqJ9pJ_Z7HE7_FYmp_Yr2ezZ6TiwFJdyB-NRnYp6JVOZEG5ICtb2lfGz1Su5pc1dDZ1teeDfpS-2g9ZZk8JBcPfs3Sho603KgBiRC4u5MAwFgONgmAiC-TW1Qr4BLYTfmMJKiJWMCb_MMNKZFRUljObNrumm5lm_2Kd8EeaY8dLeQtnx8JnWwV-0tbXS7_DOkc2q1DYhGwXnY8MOCEMrh4Xz_BdBKpKqp7Z-IEZgsof1paq6pIQjECL13YuSpfsYzm0AWfQU1VrFZyPSahDa0HKjJynrHrqO4bLYhIj9F1h78mZKpweVO1DrZOctOAZsnaqubEhhvGYItB4u88RdWvv-niJKxJVR0lk488k6DbhxE%3D) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=852371a9ab1c4c75a1f6b9fa4504c22b&_e=Fx0ua2KdGm9p8Ba2n1kco6Kn3NXLDBTMLTVWaSGWTDnmwZ44JeMrGaf9ij6ejbO9H-Z5WFCzcmi8-rzmP9Rad2I8-dRLu7j_iVsjnF2zkiI7hWiIEGRs_ciqdthObOwqJ9pJ_Z7HE7_FYmp_Yr2ezZ6TiwFJdyB-NRnYp6JVOZEG5ICtb2lfGz1Su5pc1dDZ1teeDfpS-2g9ZZk8JBcPfs3Sho603KgBiRC4u5MAwFgONgmAiC-TW1Qr4BLYTfmMJKiJWMCb_MMNKZFRUljObFjp53fBi8S1AH6ikegc7cb29MISBqvwgJWnys6N_jpZQmYML9qm7GKGbn5fHnWwbtCx-I3pCWt7279J0hT4rJqePKb8LdEdYJDlaQKXNDdqFxzd0oc51UO7kincCjWN26jX3IzJxmIWFQGn8MT17Vhlb3hdSM1y9Kw00fhOqBnsLe1DENotbv53OwbjJhvFYHVYRVhdkAn_p5EqPQhifRs%3D)
I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Peter. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=852371a9ab1c4c75a1f6b9fa4504c22b&_e=Fx0ua2KdGm9p8Ba2n1kco6Kn3NXLDBTMLTVWaSGWTDnmwZ44JeMrGaf9ij6ejbO9H-Z5WFCzcmi8-rzmP9Rad2I8-dRLu7j_iVsjnF2zkiI7hWiIEGRs_ciqdthObOwqJ9pJ_Z7HE7_FYmp_Yr2ezZ6TiwFJdyB-NRnYp6JVOZEG5ICtb2lfGz1Su5pc1dDZ1teeDfpS-2g9ZZk8JBcPfs3Sho603KgBiRC4u5MAwFgONgmAiC-TW1Qr4BLYTfmMJKiJWMCb_MMNKZFRUljObMMfErCCOIw0vihM_TEH3l9uYJAHjBDCXA_oQKsQ57J1xo3SI5UI4gz3EGDnuX-bu1Y6p0xggijM01_9RRm6zCYZbMcye3mzdg-dxrbz1vFNeIEb-bQLEG3arillBZhJUYS3JEg68IQqYvMJTt9oJSkrjAHkE5REqWsGeH9gf_pchOT6_7a7sRRyXTmcUPa_vHrcPa-vR3LvIBpRqHjVZ-E%3D) **

I’ve been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I’ve ever been a part of. Peter, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you’ll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority.

Thanks,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=852371a9ab1c4c75a1f6b9fa4504c22b&_e=Fx0ua2KdGm9p8Ba2n1kco6Kn3NXLDBTMLTVWaSGWTDnmwZ44JeMrGaf9ij6ejbO9H-Z5WFCzcmi8-rzmP9Rad2I8-dRLu7j_iVsjnF2zkiI7hWiIEGRs_ciqdthObOwqJ9pJ_Z7HE7_FYmp_Yr2ezZ6TiwFJdyB-NRnYp6JVOZEG5ICtb2lfGz1Su5pc1dDZ1teeDfpS-2g9ZZk8JBcPfs3Sho603KgBiRC4u5MAwFgONgmAiC-TW1Qr4BLYTfmMJKiJWMCb_MMNKZFRUljObCovQ5sK-JJO_wBCWuBG1XTMhXULizrobu5tyHYtxLXwlmnOP5LQi3dJCAx0z0TSG6rcJRUW82ZcAmsAtnTnUwxpa4nIeAtoM5MmUUzXUsnqHWgfzxybxNVF8lVgBTNGbJKSxpwsV-ls2_AzDl4q-wjtV8XFswfb3lYoHGR1WM-n90fJNi060czHwPvGiLMRo08cBx2zUJ-fJxRz8YtOuB4%3D)

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: re: Texas’ radical abortion ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
#

Women in Texas effectively lost the right to choose this morning.
At midnight, Texas’ radical abortion ban went into effect after the Supreme Court failed to act.
The case is working its way through the judicial system, but rather than block the radical law until the case could be heard, the courts have effectively allowed a ban on abortion in Texas.
It is a worrying sign that the Supreme Court could roll back abortion rights by overturning Roe v. Wade and decades of precedent.
This is dangerous — especially for marginalized groups including communities of color, low-income families and the LGBTQ+ community.
Congress must take action. These are difficult, personal decisions, and they should not be made by politicians.
This is a real and urgent threat, and we need to make our voices heard on this.
[**Will you sign our petition to say it’s time for Congress to codify Roe v. Wade into law? We need everyone in our fight to protect reproductive rights.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35056531/303894666/-1739314402?refcode2=749cf6bf-5a0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210901-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDljZjZiZi01YTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PPHZzTPZk6u3yOK7_NqDrXJUo1FpCpLEXHWjmgsMTwk=&emci=3f9ceb7c-4d0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=749cf6bf-5a0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=20912107)
I stand in solidarity with those working hard to fight this radical abortion ban.
This is why we need to elect senators who will stand up for reproductive rights, and I promise you can count on that from me as your senator. I will always fight for justice.
\- Cheri Beasley
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35056534/303894671/-1739314402?refcode2=749cf6bf-5a0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210901-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDljZjZiZi01YTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PPHZzTPZk6u3yOK7_NqDrXJUo1FpCpLEXHWjmgsMTwk=&emci=3f9ceb7c-4d0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=749cf6bf-5a0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=20912107)**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Game-Changing Announcement!
disclaimer_text: paid for by the establishment elite
body:
I have important news, and I wanted you to be the first to know . . .
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/R7fFlYL4cWrTw0G0CCuNPQ/x7v63PYZvJnsPHoUrIHCIw)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/lAwbT1ozsz4Qu4Om0gh7mw/x7v63PYZvJnsPHoUrIHCIw) I have important news, and I wanted you to be the first to know: **I have agreed to switch congressional districts and run against a do-nothing Republican!**

Several months ago, I was recruited by strong conservative activists to consider running against Congressman Dan Webster in the Republican Primary. Dan Webster represents Florida's 11th congressional district -- a deep red congressional seat in the heart of Trump country!

Dan Webster is a career politician who has held numerous elected offices since 1980, and the conservative base is furious with him.

Why?

Well, when Democrats impeached President Trump a second time, **do-nothing Dan Webster didn 't even bother to show up and vote!**
[**Help me win against a do-nothing Republican!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/lAwbT1ozsz4Qu4Om0gh7mw/x7v63PYZvJnsPHoUrIHCIw)
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/lAwbT1ozsz4Qu4Om0gh7mw/x7v63PYZvJnsPHoUrIHCIw)

That's inexcusable!

Even if Webster couldn't make it to Washington that day, he could have had a proxy vote "no!" for him in what was clearly a sham impeachment. **But instead, this so-called Republican did nothing!**

[**Help me beat him in the primary by backing my campaign relaunch today!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/lAwbT1ozsz4Qu4Om0gh7mw/x7v63PYZvJnsPHoUrIHCIw)

Let me tell you about my new district.

The 11th is west of Orlando and is a safe red seat. **It 's very safe and rated an R+15.**

That makes it even more inexcusable for **do-nothing Dan** when he refuses to make the most of being in a deep-red seat and take a bold and necessary stand against the Democrats' power grab, open borders, mandatory mask and vaccine mandates, the denial of due-process for the January 6th political prisoners, Big Tech tyranny and election interference against conservatives, voter fraud, defunding the police, CRT, Islamic terrorism, the disastrous withdrawal by the Biden-Harris regime in Afghanistan, and so much more!

In a time such as this, we need a high-energy fighter in Congress who's not afraid to take on the Democrats, the squad, the fake news media, or members of their own party who are failing their constituents and the American people.

It is not enough to just flip the House red in 2022 and keep sending do-nothing Republicans back to Washington. We have to take back the House with Republicans who are not only constitutional conservatives, but also activists who will fight to keep America great and listen to the people they are sworn to represent!

That is why I have agreed to switch districts. I am listening. I have heard the call, and I am ready to take on do-nothing-Dan!

And when I win this primary, no matter who the Democrats run against me in the general election, they'll have a near-impossible chance to beat me in an America-first, hard-red congressional district!

But this won't be a cake walk.

**I 'll need to raise $180,000 each month for the next year to be able to knock out do-nothing Dan.**

[**Will you be one of the first investors in my new campaign?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/lAwbT1ozsz4Qu4Om0gh7mw/x7v63PYZvJnsPHoUrIHCIw)

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/lAwbT1ozsz4Qu4Om0gh7mw/x7v63PYZvJnsPHoUrIHCIw)

Like I said, this won't be easy and that's because **I know the GOP establishment is going to fight me**.

They don't want someone like me in Congress, because I absolutely will NOT sit down or be quiet, they will not own me, they know I am not, nor will I ever be, bought and paid for by the establishment elite.

They know I'll raise hell against the Democrats while they sit on their hands or tweet out empty platitudes.

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/lAwbT1ozsz4Qu4Om0gh7mw/x7v63PYZvJnsPHoUrIHCIw)

clean_body: I have important news, and I wanted you to be the first to know . . . | | | Patriot, I have important news, and I wanted you to be the first to know: I have agreed to switch congressional districts and run against a do-nothing Republican! Several months ago, I was recruited by strong conservative activists to consider running against Congressman Dan Webster in the Republican Primary. Dan Webster represents Florida's 11th congressional district -- a deep red congressional seat in the heart of Trump country! Dan Webster is a career politician who has held numerous elected offices since 1980, and the conservative base is furious with him. Why? Well, when Democrats impeached President Trump a second time, do-nothing Dan Webster didn 't even bother to show up and vote! That's inexcusable! Even if Webster couldn't make it to Washington that day, he could have had a proxy vote "no!" for him in what was clearly a sham impeachment. But instead, this so-called Republican did nothing! Let me tell you about my new district. The 11th is west of Orlando and is a safe red seat. It 's very safe and rated an R+15. That makes it even more inexcusable for do-nothing Dan when he refuses to make the most of being in a deep-red seat and take a bold and necessary stand against the Democrats' power grab, open borders, mandatory mask and vaccine mandates, the denial of due-process for the January 6th political prisoners, Big Tech tyranny and election interference against conservatives, voter fraud, defunding the police, CRT, Islamic terrorism, the disastrous withdrawal by the Biden-Harris regime in Afghanistan, and so much more! In a time such as this, we need a high-energy fighter in Congress who's not afraid to take on the Democrats, the squad, the fake news media, or members of their own party who are failing their constituents and the American people. It is not enough to just flip the House red in 2022 and keep sending do-nothing Republicans back to Washington. We have to take back the House with Republicans who are not only constitutional conservatives, but also activists who will fight to keep America great and listen to the people they are sworn to represent! That is why I have agreed to switch districts. I am listening. I have heard the call, and I am ready to take on do-nothing-Dan! And when I win this primary, no matter who the Democrats run against me in the general election, they'll have a near-impossible chance to beat me in an America-first, hard-red congressional district! But this won't be a cake walk. I 'll need to raise $180,000 each month for the next year to be able to knock out do-nothing Dan. Like I said, this won't be easy and that's because I know the GOP establishment is going to fight me. They don't want someone like me in Congress, because I absolutely will NOT sit down or be quiet, they will not own me, they know I am not, nor will I ever be, bought and paid for by the establishment elite. They know I'll raise hell against the Democrats while they sit on their hands or tweet out empty platitudes. You know I'm woman of action and true to my word. I absolutely will NOT compromise when it comes to defending our nation against foreign or domestic threats. The establishment GOP is also afraid I'll be the "AOC of the Republican party", only I'll actually be working hard to move our party back to the constitutional and pro-America policies that protect our national sovereignty, Americans' personal liberties, and always put AMERICA FIRST! And they're right! I'm bringing constitutional-conservative activism and true representation to Washington. I can't do it without your support - . Are you in? Thank you for all that you do. body:
Don’t let extremists take away reproductive freedom
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35056941/303895939/-2023814932?refcode=20210901.4_TM_9G&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTRiYTIwNy01YjBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=myxWtThylD1ECoUSHK5WLQdS5mZxmGGq9y8w7-JIY9E=)

| | Derek, what’s happening right now in Texas should terrify us. Overnight, the Texas legislature implemented severe restrictions on abortion, essentially ending Roe v. Wade protections in the state.

It’s outrageous, and it’s exactly what Glenn Youngkin has in mind when he was caught on tape admitting that he wants to go 'on offense' and ban abortion in the Commonwealth.

Let me be clear: whether it’s Youngkin in Virginia or Republicans in Texas, these extreme restrictions put people's health and lives at risk. It’s wrong for Virginia. It’s wrong for our country and I promise you I’m going to fight like hell to stop it.

**[Today, I’m asking you to stand with me on defending reproductive rights. Will you add your name and support defending Roe v. Wade and reproductive freedom?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35056942/303895940/1926953953?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTRiYTIwNy01YjBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=myxWtThylD1ECoUSHK5WLQdS5mZxmGGq9y8w7-JIY9E=&emci=31bec1bb-3f0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=9e4ba207-5b0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=7540477)**

We've seen these extreme right-wing attacks on reproductive health in Virginia before, and as governor I fought back against every single one. I kept reproductive health clinics open when extreme right wing Republicans like Glenn tried to force them to close, and I vetoed every bill that aimed to restrict reproductive rights — including multiple efforts to defund Planned Parenthood.

As I have been before, I will always be a brick wall against any attacks on reproductive rights in the Commonwealth of Virginia.

**[Derek, will you add your name so I know you’re ready to fight alongside me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35056943/303895941/1926953953?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTRiYTIwNy01YjBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=myxWtThylD1ECoUSHK5WLQdS5mZxmGGq9y8w7-JIY9E=&emci=31bec1bb-3f0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=9e4ba207-5b0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=7540477)** | [ADD MY NAME: I support reproductive rights](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35056944/303895942/1926953953?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTRiYTIwNy01YjBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=myxWtThylD1ECoUSHK5WLQdS5mZxmGGq9y8w7-JIY9E=&emci=31bec1bb-3f0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=9e4ba207-5b0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=7540477)

name: Drew Thompson
subject: Don't Miss Jane's Next Weekend of Action!
body:
Join the Largest Team in Ohio [](https://) **The best ground game in the Buckeye state is holding our biggest day yet on September 25th!** Peter , Thanks to your help, our team has already contacted 400,000+ Ohioans in our fight to ensure Jane Timken is our next U.S. Senator. As you can see below, our ground game has activated hundreds of interns and volunteers already! This massive head start in the field is impressive, **but we are only getting started**. In less than 4 weeks, on September 25th, Jane will be joining our team at 4 different locations in what will be our second Day of Action! As opposed to the passive, social media campaign that our opponents rely on, we put in the effort every single day. Jane knows that taking the America First message directly to Ohioan's is how she delivered our state for President Trump in 2020, and it will be the grassroots momentum that carries Ohio again in 2022. body:
Will you join me? | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDC5rjOMTGqhE4wEikFuKw0PN60mn02-mVJV6XrRpuZ-X5Ldu1zmHV77wKvgFVX277qpWNdSmZ9WjdBaUWsShyUfie7OUoyf2clAwUXeUBDVmmY_BvY5uz0V3zTh8ylPGXbFWc1I_FQbLD4pBqu5WdeT9ksPyCXu-P86GwLFpD5GoDPJZBbrwlJKdhVx1wUoZMDULGpN8uUCd3mDs6WrPpnxjR5wRT3cQhgLXglXG9mwbFE4UW8ZM-jDij7CEHQwoTz0Z-CBPJ3dKhwdawhluE3FIGhaqDvXBUuta9nefGuYuH4cy2qnU9hgpiDQ3qkAGCVmE02kED-xjqEUf3T3Ar5U/3ey/lM8mVrd_SLaywMpd4KAKgw/h0/v_585A2x_OPD2DcbOT-zr5ZqfsTFt7cv4PvEJHlITsY)
My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse.

As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it.

**Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.**

**[I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Common Good VA so we can stop the alt-right and Marjorie Taylor Greene:](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDC5rjOMTGqhE4wEikFuKw0PE6JvhQjcnD_HEBWxn_T59sFTqp3eLpGyy-8aGkI5BUbF8Y2HPWZ72M_7pqg_WfqlswodvhONl0T6WJ54tL9iY7ExQQSTRgHPhfi6VlMM36dTmmhOdB5T4H216ircjB-EhZUoKbgzxjo8jvCaVjOsjSCSO1vbd1daV2PydoRqvGxx5hNUms3hefpQueVtngCkJv9MLRk5Wf_1ZIeDgQtR9IGG51LIBn-YH5XJJZqZ3gpDpFQ3KQyOsGucoYNx-e9Lj6KJ1dBbntWkPVYh82jIGu3AMDcRgVWQp5ifKfr6YY_oifiyGTEOzaKiv13THwNU/3ey/lM8mVrd_SLaywMpd4KAKgw/h1/HU5Oy3-ZnAAxo8bU9BIZEyf3H0YRrNX9h5HBYjYpISc)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDAmfO6V_yP4sKknA0NEi_ZXyKGa5sUqySmpHVWJ1UAMlhWen-LNyVq5xFn_w_R06-9WEDrYz0PirDUw2PqcAkQrBHWmnOxAQWV9gtfXsZ7kKT7dwVPkKn1B3Vbp5xgOBIIevczqoVqd_QGLZpNWQTOnb1d6FQX5mOEORyukYuVIcZ49Q4IpWB_x18dzzPlZmKKvlsVbVooJnQFHoOnAwgDvYGW1CI3hGaBHtwil9EPs_Qooy6iQUepH_tlDz5DBnFfGcv4kL8yeZaQNU8qE6nK3KBFozWNYZyehS2qcrnUpW9sYC-VDdhL1ApXKizYyG7_XImxhUKhSRHcXeo0MfYEg/3ey/lM8mVrd_SLaywMpd4KAKgw/h2/qX3DJKzk6PC3EigGyAkyH6krfDG7uvnPW5MGC4szkZ8)

clean_body: Will you join me? | | | My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race. Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to beat Greene and other Trump-Republicans like Glenn Youngkin will be difficult. Greene is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Team Warner
subject: The battle over the right to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Our leaders should be focused on making sure every eligible voter can cast their ballot as easily as possible -- but instead, many Republican-led legislatures are doing the exact opposite.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35058110/303902640/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2FiYzVjYy01ZjBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d9UIS17dVhtIdNN1ECZeocE9Be7ZXl13EAgw_g2hEKM=&emci=8ff329e7-4d0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ccabc5cc-5f0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, One of our most sacred rights as American citizens is the right to vote. Our leaders should be focused on making sure every eligible voter can cast their ballot as easily as possible -- but instead, many Republican-led legislatures are doing the exact opposite. **Just last week, the U.S. House passed the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. When the Senate returns in September, protecting voting rights should be at the top of the list.** **_[When we protect the right to vote, we safeguard our democracy. Will you add your name to Senator Mark Warner’s petition calling for immediate Senate action on voting rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35058112/303902641/-564231740?ms=mw_em_210901_1&refcode=mw_em_210901_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2FiYzVjYy01ZjBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d9UIS17dVhtIdNN1ECZeocE9Be7ZXl13EAgw_g2hEKM=&emci=8ff329e7-4d0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ccabc5cc-5f0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4568237)_** Senator Warner believes no voter in Virginia and or anywhere across the country should ever face discrimination by a state or local government when trying to cast their vote. That’s why it is an absolute imperative the Senate passes the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. **_[Sign on right now if you’re with Senator Warner in the battle to protect voting rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35058113/303902642/-564231740?ms=mw_em_210901_1&refcode=mw_em_210901_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2FiYzVjYy01ZjBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d9UIS17dVhtIdNN1ECZeocE9Be7ZXl13EAgw_g2hEKM=&emci=8ff329e7-4d0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ccabc5cc-5f0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4568237)_** Thanks, Team Warner **[Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35058114/303902643/-564231740?ms=mw_em_210901_1&refcode=mw_em_210901_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2FiYzVjYy01ZjBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d9UIS17dVhtIdNN1ECZeocE9Be7ZXl13EAgw_g2hEKM=&emci=8ff329e7-4d0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ccabc5cc-5f0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4568237)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35058710/303904984/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDU0ZTg0Ni02MTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iCaPVS5f40Ye3SiPiRMcs7YvYyKA-cKfXjX2IfoJ9lU=&emci=c5d81493-220b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=6054e846-610b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

This team never ceases to amaze me -- the way you have shown up for this campaign always reminds me about the reason I'm doing this work.

I'm doing this work for nurses, like my mom, who can't afford their own medicine. I'm doing this work for women who don't feel safe in their homes. I'm doing this work for people who can't afford to go to college. I'm doing this work for workers who are still vying for a living wage. **I'm doing this work for _you_ , Peter.**

Like so many in this district, I am frustrated by the _callous leadership_ of Mike Garcia. Time after time, he's proven that he will prioritize his political career over what's best for this district.

While Mike Garcia's campaign is being funded by corporate PACs and special interests, this campaign is run by grassroots supporters like you. **Every _dollar_ donated during this end-of-month campaign has allowed our movement to grow and puts us one step closer to defeating Mike Garcia.**

So thank you so much for supporting our campaign and being part of progress.

\-- Christy [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35058712/303904986/-392799195?refcode=em21_210902_eomty-s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDU0ZTg0Ni02MTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iCaPVS5f40Ye3SiPiRMcs7YvYyKA-cKfXjX2IfoJ9lU=) [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35058716/303904990/-392799195?refcode=em21_210902_eomty-s1&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDU0ZTg0Ni02MTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iCaPVS5f40Ye3SiPiRMcs7YvYyKA-cKfXjX2IfoJ9lU=)

subject: We’re tied with DeSantis

body:
Dear Friends,

New polling shows that we’re tied with Ron DeSantis in a head-to-head matchup.

This is big, friends. Floridians are fed up with DeSantis’ failure and absence during times of crisis.

Friends, here’s the bottom line: every single poll from the past two months has showed DeSantis vulnerable. With your help, I know we can win this race.

Our campaign against Ron is working, but we can’t let up now. Our momentum will continue growing if we keep the pressure on, so please click here and help us keep building. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-sept-poll-1]

I can’t thank you enough for your continued support. Without your donations and your work to hold DeSantis accountable, we wouldn’t be in such a strong position.

And I know that if supporters like you continue to step up, we’re going to win next year.

If you can help us start September strong and build our winning campaign against DeSantis, please click here to donate today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-sept-poll-1]

Thank you so much for your support 💜 🙏

—Nikki

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Biden's National Nightmare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| |
---
Peter:

Terrorists are celebrating Joe Biden's catastrophe in Afghanistan. Afghan friends are being murdered. Afghan women and girls are facing a lifetime of oppression and abuse. Even Biden's fan club in the media can't defend his debacle.

But many reporters are saying this failure may hurt President Biden's otherwise positive legacy. Seriously? He's been president for seven months, and it's been nothing but failures!

▶︎ The border crisis is worse than ever.
▶︎ Inflation is ravaging our economy.
▶︎ Gas prices are soaring.
▶︎ Violent crime has followed his party's "defund the police" insanity.
▶︎ And now he's handed terrorists their greatest victory since 9/11.

**[Help fight back against Joe Biden 's bumbling!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58234320:JhWdDT2N8:m:1:3253819041:F86698C6A27B6EEDBE4524BD0C5CA100:r)**

Under President Trump's leadership, none of these problems existed. They are all the result of Joe Biden and congressional Democrats' radicalism and incompetence.

Biden says Afghanistan isn't another Vietnam. But the truth is, the Democrats' control of Washington is becoming another _**national nightmare**_.

The only question is whether it will be long or short.

And that's up to us.

**[Join me in supporting the House Freedom Fund to take Nancy Pelosi 's gavel away from her once and for all.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58234320:JhWdDT2N8:m:1:3253819041:F86698C6A27B6EEDBE4524BD0C5CA100:r)**

With Biden, Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer in charge, things are only getting worse. Democrats' failure in Afghanistan will trigger a global refugee crisis. Their budget is going to add another trillion dollars to our out-of-control national debt. Their phony "infrastructure" bill is a back-door Green New Deal. Their education policies promote Critical Race Theory and anti-American propaganda.

**We 're fighting back, but we need your help.**

House Freedom Fund needs to post a HUGE fundraising number this quarter to send a signal Washington can't ignore.

**[Click here to contribute to HFF today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58234320:JhWdDT2N8:m:1:3253819041:F86698C6A27B6EEDBE4524BD0C5CA100:r)**

_**We have to win back the House in 2022**_ - from the Democrats and the RINOs who help them. When campaign finance reports are released, both parties will look to see where the momentum is.

If conservatives step up now, Democrats will cut and run from the president's failed agenda. We can start making an impact before the campaign heats up!

**[But we can 't do it without you. Please give as generously as you can, right now!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58234320:JhWdDT2N8:m:1:3253819041:F86698C6A27B6EEDBE4524BD0C5CA100:r)**

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,
JIM JORDAN
U.S. Congressman, R-Ohio

clean_body: | | Peter: Terrorists are celebrating Joe Biden's catastrophe in Afghanistan. Afghan friends are being murdered. Afghan women and girls are facing a lifetime of oppression and abuse. Even Biden's fan club in the media can't defend his debacle. But many reporters are saying this failure may hurt President Biden's otherwise positive legacy. Seriously? He's been president for seven months, and it's been nothing but failures! ▶︎ The border crisis is worse than ever. ▶︎ Inflation is ravaging our economy. ▶︎ Gas prices are soaring. ▶︎ Violent crime has followed his party's "defund the police" insanity. ▶︎ And now he's handed terrorists their greatest victory since 9/11. Under President Trump's leadership, none of these problems existed. They are all the result of Joe Biden and congressional Democrats' radicalism and incompetence. Biden says Afghanistan isn't another Vietnam. But the truth is, the Democrats' control of Washington is becoming another national nightmare. The only question is whether it will be long or short. And that's up to us. With Biden, Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer in charge, things are only getting worse. Democrats' failure in Afghanistan will trigger a global refugee crisis. Their budget is going to add another trillion dollars to our out-of-control national debt. Their phony "infrastructure" bill is a back-door Green New Deal. Their education policies promote Critical Race Theory and anti-American propaganda. We 're fighting back, but we need your help. House Freedom Fund needs to post a HUGE fundraising number this quarter to send a signal Washington can't ignore. We have to win back the House in 2022 - from the Democrats and the RINOs who help them. When campaign finance reports are released, both parties will look to see where the momentum is. If conservatives step up now, Democrats will cut and run from the president's failed agenda. We can start making an impact before the campaign heats up! Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future. name: Alek
subject: Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism in the eyes
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
A terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44c4e988fefa4eb5be3adcfdc7572796&_e=ZgXFQfashjEArYBNa2MjQZOzMNkRTwx7w54PSg_h9_SgbadI-EACeESyFGqUkKTwRNrozkgXfJhXeqOtpRjrnvJMLXj-VVp0B9CH7w1WpORlcFaJgnJq5O0FcjOIRkxlypHMXnWW-WZsDVlNt3GxzrGyvj2vXK0BcRU51Q26tl72ip8HvbAoIuccel-ViAUE8VTnkBchR7iRgzmaW9T18f3fLauei03uEB9lj3xnFUR2b1jdTuJIl5zzMsU6O-NsD37NLQHJeuJpz-JyQ1XTbTs4c5huOzvUKy2kWTFJujc3AIJLCuH3fKnf1pXdWeogTcb5-Sl1ABRwc0oze4y3rWdOzVIcRlGgJStbdzue8JDENXWcAID5zGIL1ER5NJJL5UYOAFbQxbty7-7IbMAWJfTIloYndYSeYb2X8Nms-B2KUKsZBAwF1864y907-4ichgmN6FaFlMfW-pN_PQnKwA%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44c4e988fefa4eb5be3adcfdc7572796&_e=ZgXFQfashjEArYBNa2MjQZOzMNkRTwx7w54PSg_h9_SgbadI-EACeESyFGqUkKTwRNrozkgXfJhXeqOtpRjrnvJMLXj-VVp0B9CH7w1WpORlcFaJgnJq5O0FcjOIRkxlypHMXnWW-WZsDVlNt3GxzrGyvj2vXK0BcRU51Q26tl72ip8HvbAoIuccel-ViAUE8VTnkBchR7iRgzmaW9T18f3fLauei03uEB9lj3xnFUR2b1jdTuJIl5zzMsU6O-NsoBTQeNtiFzOxfXAllSvCxl0-J_EJJiq9IXhgoMgATDw4vsilAoSSaZS_67o_KaINIXHTA59LSuofqgkgLOKbd9hu1uygrRzuYGV9Qvw27vdkRqFWxli82_RcLCumDtFv0-CaCCZf0X_ZAbT5l8a7z9ytwgNyMhwjE1Wgjlak91uwuhk8wHmfsuCWXXJqky01CWlDucNYY-B2w15fmK74Wg%3D%3D)
I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44c4e988fefa4eb5be3adcfdc7572796&_e=ZgXFQfashjEArYBNa2MjQZOzMNkRTwx7w54PSg_h9_SgbadI-EACeESyFGqUkKTwRNrozkgXfJhXeqOtpRjrnvJMLXj-VVp0B9CH7w1WpORlcFaJgnJq5O0FcjOIRkxlypHMXnWW-WZsDVlNt3GxzrGyvj2vXK0BcRU51Q26tl72ip8HvbAoIuccel-ViAUE8VTnkBchR7iRgzmaW9T18f3fLauei03uEB9lj3xnFUR2b1jdTuJIl5zzMsU6O-NsmFsvFUkU6sq_qyMCcK90kJlVt0pAwN-o5kcuHLwC7tmxx1EWp8xWSXpg8JClrhJrHgGcp7c9khxhqDH5UbBBK17rzzV_TdLK0Jq-Uw0kFTrF77yB1snhWxIZtreC0l4A5ILgaHWmetZGTgDX28a8UiZcdLRs54SS8msnTd96I1jGbEc0FJ8MZ8uqsrMN7FkV-eve37sDWA5_SRkYhz6JpQ%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44c4e988fefa4eb5be3adcfdc7572796&_e=ZgXFQfashjEArYBNa2MjQZOzMNkRTwx7w54PSg_h9_SgbadI-EACeESyFGqUkKTwRNrozkgXfJhXeqOtpRjrnvJMLXj-VVp0B9CH7w1WpORlcFaJgnJq5O0FcjOIRkxlypHMXnWW-WZsDVlNt3GxzrGyvj2vXK0BcRU51Q26tl72ip8HvbAoIuccel-ViAUE8VTnkBchR7iRgzmaW9T18f3fLauei03uEB9lj3xnFUR2b1jdTuJIl5zzMsU6O-Ns_p9OcfJI_vpUXF7ktRCQ5JVXaG3FxGZRtIQnr7EQ0Oigs0BAecgV2Zuq-Yi0sg00Vg974F-fuQSCCBJVV9YHyLHmHJvALi_niLbMQY05zW8Rg6JgsmQPU15j96rbn37il1m4i2S0mklAgLKDFWuPWpzppz7gHGD0fF-NZo5GvhKM_WrDGmfkJs4DUqCBNCd1wbsTjQ_oWBzMiFU0RlNXuQ%3D%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44c4e988fefa4eb5be3adcfdc7572796&_e=ZgXFQfashjEArYBNa2MjQZOzMNkRTwx7w54PSg_h9_SgbadI-EACeESyFGqUkKTwRNrozkgXfJhXeqOtpRjrnvJMLXj-VVp0B9CH7w1WpORlcFaJgnJq5O0FcjOIRkxlypHMXnWW-WZsDVlNt3GxzrGyvj2vXK0BcRU51Q26tl72ip8HvbAoIuccel-ViAUE8VTnkBchR7iRgzmaW9T18f3fLauei03uEB9lj3xnFUR2b1jdTuJIl5zzMsU6O-NscbiJFJCNRPS4NicFP_v96dJB_mGwRdiPlLbCFXohTQjGpPk2mx2zG9z8RlTAJin5PBa0Qawn8qBiNaVqksyYAKLdcur329cR0b8Sv6wbGaEoMBm_Z21iUSZ0rJe06c5q1v7zl6tO_oJcOjN3thUPnFn-mDuDh5i-oxyqrnMh379vIJ9sd-9IuF1vUKGRF3pNzaS-Qb1G1EUAgtNNHGEK8g%3D%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $6 - to mark my sixth anniversary of thwarting a terrorist attack?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44c4e988fefa4eb5be3adcfdc7572796&_e=ZgXFQfashjEArYBNa2MjQZOzMNkRTwx7w54PSg_h9_SgbadI-EACeESyFGqUkKTwRNrozkgXfJhXeqOtpRjrnvJMLXj-VVp0B9CH7w1WpORlcFaJgnJq5O0FcjOIRkxlypHMXnWW-WZsDVlNt3GxzrGyvj2vXK0BcRU51Q26tl72ip8HvbAoIuccel-ViAUE8VTnkBchR7iRgzmaW9T18f3fLauei03uEB9lj3xnFUR2b1jdTuJIl5zzMsU6O-NsNkl8JQyJqH9lrTPnAY5dxIsWGb81aJbYqViHXgXMFywKrPmK7OkCJXaCRlGJ5v6tQHp0vloR_xLohlE7ufa6_X7F4R5P8gqF_ZKKXC7VbPBkf5ltSBeLkVtnq4mwt8aNeiDT4Vbft4O0C1Xs93W-m_qnIUsp6GS--pYc1KeGEXUFJhi34WeatOvHLIf3HmxyVAskrRANepm8On9t82vzPQ%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44c4e988fefa4eb5be3adcfdc7572796&_e=ZgXFQfashjEArYBNa2MjQZOzMNkRTwx7w54PSg_h9_SgbadI-EACeESyFGqUkKTwRNrozkgXfJhXeqOtpRjrnvJMLXj-VVp0B9CH7w1WpORlcFaJgnJq5O0FcjOIRkxlypHMXnWW-WZsDVlNt3GxzrGyvj2vXK0BcRU51Q26tl72ip8HvbAoIuccel-ViAUE8VTnkBchR7iRgzmaW9T18f3fLauei03uEB9lj3xnFUR2b1jdTuJIl5zzMsU6O-Ns6yFx2iXNcUZhy85ZVpAsZi8RUIMVNCrW0XK81llthn9xOZ-1Zw4FEzD_RT0s_VnL2fscfN_nz5hpjpRUewQwuL_L9YzNZoMWfw14_K2JP-QQ0Ni7WxosSkWP33ONQENAlDCsfvjvo5cA37L4G268OdXPfR5kwZ0KjANBCmzRS7CTO6gkNCx-Vb26di-BLXpr1L6S11WUDhsM2M5JbPeu_w%3D%3D)

Thank you very much,
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world.
