name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: SB 8 is NOT about health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This radical, cruel, and dangerous law cuts off access to almost all abortions for millions of people in Texas. But it also has massive implications for the future of Roe v. Wade and millions of additional Americans across the country.
#
Peter,
Last night, the Supreme Court allowed Texas Senate Bill 8, the most extreme abortion ban in the country, to go into effect. Today, abortions are banned after six weeks across the state. _That’s_ _before many people even know they are pregnant._
This radical, cruel, and dangerous law cuts off access to almost all abortions for millions of people in Texas. **But it also has massive implications for the future of**** _Roe v. Wade_****and millions of additional Americans across the country because one in four women have had an abortion — and I am one of them.**
SB 8 is NOT about health care, Peter. Extreme laws like this are about controlling and punishing women and pregnant people — eroding their Constitutional rights while disproportionately harming low-income people and people of color.
Congress must immediately act to remove barriers to care and defend the right to choose — because reproductive rights are human rights. [**Can you split a contribution of $3 or any amount between our campaign and the Planned Parenthood Action Fund today to help us defend reproductive rights in the weeks and months to come?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210901?refcode=em20210901-596&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=596_420207_cPrzCn&akid=596%2E420207%2EcPrzCn)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210901?refcode=em20210901-596&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=596_420207_cPrzCn&akid=596%2E420207%2EcPrzCn)**
I know firsthand what a profoundly personal choice getting an abortion is and the importance of an individual’s right to decide whether or not to have one for themselves — regardless of income or zip code.
For me, terminating a pregnancy was not an easy choice, but it was _my_ choice. That is the single thing that has allowed me to live with the consequences of my decisions. **And that is what we must preserve for every person.**
_So, where do we begin?_ Well, Congress can start with passing the Women’s Health Protection Act that I helped to introduce to create a safeguard against abortion bans and medically unnecessary restrictions. Then, we have to defend our Senate majority so that Mitch McConnell doesn’t control which justices get on the Supreme Court.
[**I really do believe our collective organizing and activism can hold the line for reproductive freedom in this country. We have to. If you can afford it at this time, will you chip in a split contribution of $3 or more between our campaign and the Planned Parenthood Action Fund today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210901?refcode=em20210901-596&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=596_420207_cPrzCn&akid=596%2E420207%2EcPrzCn)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210901-596-footer&t=23&refcode2=596_420207_cPrzCn&akid=596%2E420207%2EcPrzCn)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Team Rosen
subject: urgent: protect reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Today, a near total ban on abortion went into effect in Texas -- and the conservative Supreme Court has so far refused to block this draconian attack on our reproductive rights.
#
Did you see the awful news, team?
**Today, a near total ban on abortion went into effect in Texas** \-- and the conservative Supreme Court has so far refused to block this draconian attack on our reproductive rights.
This is a direct assault on Roe v. Wade and the constitutionally protected right to choose. It’s clear that we have to fight back with everything we have with our rights hanging in the balance.
**[Add your name to the petition right now to show you’re part of the pro-choice majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35060147/303909077/324985793?ms=jr_em_nd_210901_1&refcode=jr_em_nd_210901_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzczMjJjNy02NjBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q0Sf2_tNtkKdR13AHJyhBNKI6PE-hH4uXAUj1aE766I=&emci=dc8dbb58-580b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2c7322c7-660b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=3800590)**

name: Sen. Patty Murray
subject: Protect Roe v. Wade: add your name
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
If you believe people should be able to make their own decisions about their own bodies, sign on now.
#
Peter,
Have you heard the news? Today, one of the strictest reproductive health laws in the country goes into effect in Texas, banning abortion as early as six weeks and giving complete strangers the ability to sue medical providers and anyone who helps someone in Texas get an abortion.
While this law is dangerous for Texans trying to get reproductive health care and unconstitutional -- it could also provide the playbook for states around the country to pass extreme abortion restrictions without having to wait for the Supreme Court.
**[We need supporters like you to help defend the right to legal abortion. Will you add your name now to protect Roe v. Wade?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35060242/303909421/-1055335467?ms=pm_em_210901_1&refcode=pm_em_210901_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTExODYwMS02NzBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DyOWVXC7ZZ6DwDEIBD3VIviPhH7NQc0H5ZI-TaRLq5g=&emci=96946204-640b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=49118601-670b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=13116610)**
This is just one of many laws passed in 2021 to restrict access to reproductive health care.This law is designed to intimidate patients from getting the health care they want and need and has nothing to do with the health and safety of the patient. Now is our time to stand up and loudly reject this attack on the personal freedom of every American.
**[If you believe people should be able to make their own decisions about their own bodies, sign on now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35060243/303909422/-1055335467?ms=pm_em_210901_1&refcode=pm_em_210901_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTExODYwMS02NzBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DyOWVXC7ZZ6DwDEIBD3VIviPhH7NQc0H5ZI-TaRLq5g=&emci=96946204-640b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=49118601-670b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=13116610)**
I will keep fighting in the Senate for action to protect every American’s ability to get an abortion and to ensure everyone -- in Texas and across the country -- can make their own choices about pregnancy and parenting.
Thank you,
Patty Murray

**[Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35060244/303909423/-1055335467?ms=pm_em_210901_1&refcode=pm_em_210901_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTExODYwMS02NzBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DyOWVXC7ZZ6DwDEIBD3VIviPhH7NQc0H5ZI-TaRLq5g=&emci=96946204-640b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=49118601-670b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=13116610)**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**

This is urgent, friend.

**After the Supreme Court refused to act, the Texas GOP's so-called "Heartbeat" law went into effect today, dealing the biggest blow to women's reproductive rights Texas has ever seen.** The law effectively prohibits reproductive care for at least _85% of women_ and will force many clinics to close.

Over 5 million people in Texas have no health insurance and that includes _1 in 4 women of childbearing age_. This law will disproportionately impact the reproductive health of the lowest-income women.

Let me first say that if you're in Texas, I understand if you're feeling overwhelmed right now, especially fellow Texas women. You have my word that I will do everything I can to fight against this horrible legislation.

That ultimately starts with breaking the GOP's ironclad grip on our state -- from the top to the bottom. That's why our campaign knocked on over 50,000 doors last election resulting in the highest turnout and most Democratic votes in the history of our district. We're upping that goal this year in our Democratic-leaning district.

We won't stop until we get it done. _Too much is at stake._

[**Will you chip in an urgent $3 to respond to this horrible news and help my team lay the foundation for our voter contact operation? name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: I’m extremely grateful for everything you do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hi there,
I wanted to stop for a minute to personally say thanks for all of the support you showed me over the past month and for being a part of the team.
Whether you donated, signed a petition, or simply read our emails and stayed up to date with what’s going on — every action you take supports our movement in a big way. And I'm extremely grateful for everything you do.
I’m running for Senate because I’m fed up with politicians pretending to care about the struggles working-class folks face across this country.
And I won’t ever stop fighting to end those struggles because I know just how real they are.
The struggle was real for me when my family got eviction notices even though both of my parents worked — and it was real when I had to start working at just 12 years old to help pay rent.
So, when I hear people trying to make those challenges harder for working folks, I remember how I felt when my family struggled, and I have no choice but to speak up.
That's what this campaign is about — building a movement that strives for equity and justice for all, powered by working people.
And I'm so glad that you're a part of it. Nothing we do would be possible without you.
The months ahead are going to be critical for building a movement strong enough to win this race next fall, so we've got a lot of work to do.
But with you by my side, I know we have what it takes to go the distance.
Thanks again for everything.
Onward,
Malcolm
If you're able, please consider making a donation to fuel our grassroots movement for Pennsylvania.
We're facing our next FEC deadline at the end of this month, after which we're legally mandated to publicly report our fundraising numbers.
So it's important that we keep pace this month.
**Anything you can give will go a long way since we're powered 100% by grassroots donations.**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35061017/303912318/-353695395?refcode2=4c1a471c-690b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210901-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzFhNDcxYy02OTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gv6nPPrIS62dmtNBO_GjKbzyCz4-iUAiEuMT1g2JBx8=)**
We appreciate your support!

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC
---
Malcolm PAC
PO Box 22395
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, [click here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/97362b3c-650b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/4c1a471c-690b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzFhNDcxYy02OTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gv6nPPrIS62dmtNBO_GjKbzyCz4-iUAiEuMT1g2JBx8=&id=120380453) to unsubscribe. body:

| | | | |
# [BREAKING: Rand Paul is pushing HORSE MEDICINE instead of the COVID-19 Vaccine](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc74e2a91-e9f5-4da0-9a8b-6b5873fab054/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

This isn’t just nonsense, it’s dangerous nonsense. Since this jackassery has been pushed by Paul and others, calls to poison control centers have skyrocketed. body:
The dangerous law banning abortion in Texas that’s going into effect today is extremely troubling and a reminder about what’s at stake in this election. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35061978/303915469/-1309710229?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzAwZGQ2Yi02YzBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vlzp2R_5_QnZN0o3vIAR43Y0PWStfUPDRYttIme_nZA=&emci=dff1586e-6b0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=7c00dd6b-6c0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=9499186) | Team, The dangerous law banning abortion in Texas that’s gone into effect today is extremely troubling and a reminder about what’s at stake in this election. A woman’s right to choose is on the ballot. subject: hit the ground running
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Hi Peter ,
Brit Bender here! I'm the new Executive Director of the Tennessee Democratic Party and I couldn't be more excited to hit the ground running. After working all across the nation, I'm excited to return home to Tennessee because I've seen first hand the destruction that Republican extremism has had on my home state and I've had enough.
That's why I am coming on board: to help bring the change our state desperately needs by crushing Bill Lee and the Republican supermajority.
But we have no time to waste — that's why throughout the month a generous group of donors has agreed to match EVERY donation up to our $50,000 end-of-quarter goal at the end of September.
Will you donate $25 now (which will double to $50!) to help us work toward our $50,000 goal for the month? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

| Friend,
The $3.5 Trillion budget plan is nothing but a socialist wishlist that would skyrocket our national debt to $45 Trillion by 2031. To put it into perspective, the new budget is 4X the size of Barack Obama's stimulus package.

| | | [STOP THE SOCIALIST SPENDING SPREE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rLAxgSanrez3w_rxu5XhmYvB04oYcnu3HAl8Row_tVojW4QsAbDQpGeVc8wu0QsV9Gfcvj1K0looLZwbDTcPK7XQ7dgwblXw_Shg7hdbeTJAu8oP9P4_pnlRpehorHpXMobuNrjPgPyc-Odd3I8-aKFnVBauC1J49U5b6XdRyU1GXtBfk_PcA-K2UZimZG3KXaaUPqu3SmFAgZo-HamkFg==&c=IZXYzF5U-wNMJSgWSp4tKs4DAohw8axQzsUu0c1Tum1mf-pTuLfL5A==&ch=KxWAF97XOYi86QuF-Oruf8NkcV_Z6cb11n99v0UmxAdXYQdkUdyc6A==)

| Very little of the provisions in this outrageous budget will actually help small business owners or average Americans that were unrightfully burdened by big government shutdowns. name: Karen Bass
subject: I am condemning Texas' new laws
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team --

The Texas GOP just passed one of the most restrictive voting laws in the country. The new law gives partisan poll watchers more access and power over people waiting in line to vote. It bans drive-thru voting, 24-hour polling locations, and drop boxes for mail ballots, and it prohibits mailing absentee voting applications and ballots to all eligible voters.

The GOP isn't even trying to hide it anymore, friend. They're making it intentionally harder for people to vote in elections -- especially Black and Brown voters. Trump's Big Lie that the 2020 election was "stolen" is having devastating repercussions, and these new voter restrictions in Texas are a disgrace.

I proudly voted to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act through the House last week to put a stop to racist voting restrictions. We need the Senate to act immediately and vote on the John Lewis VRAA. Our democracy depends on it.

**[The Senate needs to defend our right to vote, put a stop to the GOP's assault on our democracy, and vote on the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. Sign your name next to mine if you agree »](https://act.myngp.com/el/Vl8MWNWRJ0LCyu26K7sdT03etFTt45LwBtZ46x2Vxw8=/_AkE2t3cHSxeB0ZL8FEY9IVX4KNKqVBQN0yVMykK0oE=?gpsid=39_132_20337&ms=em21_210901_txvraa_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&refcode=em21_210901_txvraa_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210901_txvraa_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

The Texas GOP also passed through a draconian abortion ban that prohibits an abortion procedure after only six weeks -- often long before a person even realizes they're pregnant.

Karen

clean_body: Team -- The Texas GOP just passed one of the most restrictive voting laws in the country. The new law gives partisan poll watchers more access and power over people waiting in line to vote. It bans drive-thru voting, 24-hour polling locations, and drop boxes for mail ballots, and it prohibits mailing absentee voting applications and ballots to all eligible voters. The GOP isn't even trying to hide it anymore, friend. They're making it intentionally harder for people to vote in elections -- especially Black and Brown voters. Trump's Big Lie that the 2020 election was "stolen" is having devastating repercussions, and these new voter restrictions in Texas are a disgrace. I proudly voted to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act through the House last week to put a stop to racist voting restrictions. Recent polls from NBC News show that Republicans have TIED the Democrats in a “Generic Ballot” ahead of the upcoming Midterm Elections. Just two months ago, polls showed Democrats with a 7% lead. name: Alex Padilla
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Just know that whenever you donate $5 or $10, it all matters.
#

Hi —
First of all, I wanted to reach out and say thank you for being a part of this grassroots team. It’s so important that we have people from all over on our side, so your support means a great deal to me.
Because the truth is, we’re going to need that level of support to organize across California and make sure we win this race. Because you can bet that Republicans will be fired up and ready to spend whatever it takes to stop our grassroots movement.
These radical Republicans pose a real threat to the progress we’re making here in California, and they’d love to defeat us and end our ability to fight for a cleaner planet, immigration reform, or election security.
So just know that whenever you donate $5 or $10, it all matters. Because your support is what gives us the ability to go up against these radical special interests and WIN.
Thank you, for everything. I can’t imagine doing this without you.
— Alex Padilla
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210901-1-30&t=1&refcode2=272_159979_m4cQR_&akid=272%2E159979%2Em4cQR_)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=272%2E159979%2Em4cQR_)

name: Great America Update
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c319%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=M9D8IgIShLRBw8Vifreh7Q&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65368%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KBL45yw0C8sUFnvtFg4QyQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65369%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HfjDs9sRGhEkAXzlUdWU1A&sysid=1) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65360%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UaDf09KQobF3BxosIZyjpw&sysid=1)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation’s youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65361%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J7H%2fhV33IFA40AlPT9S2Cw&sysid=1)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65361%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J7H%2fhV33IFA40AlPT9S2Cw&sysid=1)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65362%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eItQiXNYrjM%2bzRzn1b63bQ&sysid=1) today.** When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65363%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iRiG2OtFfYdUwk38bA9XUg&sysid=1)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c319%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=M9D8IgIShLRBw8Vifreh7Q&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c319%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=M9D8IgIShLRBw8Vifreh7Q&sysid=1)

In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year. Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. The response has been astounding. We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. So please complete the today. When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards, Bill Gray Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty. 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

body:

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=eaf7152d5a9440eda850d6939311cf5f&_e=cqXn6ekZ2L2Jg8E63Pw2iqrDjSuhKkhOBDm14KbmPUQawaa7wA1jYMUJgkKM0D6zv3S1xUUhjNPehqlmJBG0Joo41lDsIVFAt7y7iV34nAK9TXG6zmNFtq0hpGTb4msLXY4S0t5k__dLTheFY_GcFI7L0Om-Y1cXkHF4N0hQ7WK7lk-hyRaxod2a9PxDP_7dn8rEMxTm2XYsrVWFRJ03Fo-Xe1Rvlg3JlSf922XJyf6p-Xd_QJknuVkPdgbh3gkQIVUe8xTxcubRuNhA5Qc8SGOX4N6QixKemrm68ijkJbQzOOCP4AcC72KHGd4I2i6ICpUCvJaG3R4FXiIwz2C017LiWHSaPUmCp1Pn_SE1HkDVO-hOzXBRGtGgS3JAcW88IcY5MFdk0s8qmQAszEElb5vlRcd9Za-CKAom-w08o1BS08LIIJmmGkod36swu1bizkOGByHOA9hHtsmBO8A3KsBkdDu8dvr-JsN1bb3pi6E%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=eaf7152d5a9440eda850d6939311cf5f&_e=cqXn6ekZ2L2Jg8E63Pw2iqrDjSuhKkhOBDm14KbmPUQawaa7wA1jYMUJgkKM0D6zv3S1xUUhjNPehqlmJBG0Joo41lDsIVFAt7y7iV34nAK9TXG6zmNFtq0hpGTb4msLXY4S0t5k__dLTheFY_GcFI7L0Om-Y1cXkHF4N0hQ7WK7lk-hyRaxod2a9PxDP_7dn8rEMxTm2XYsrVWFRJ03Fo-Xe1Rvlg3JlSf922XJyf6p-Xd_QJknuVkPdgbh3gkQIVUe8xTxcubRuNhA5Qc8SFZtYIzB68liymxhC82w3JTDCv9PY69wCN3nJVnsp0f3t6s0h-bAH74EPz7P_jtYYrGzvYaZs3ZXOCcsply_U_Esr2B3Dc24vbnqCcGvPhuXPA9GxXzX3bSKqeQb3ubKp74Rl45Czf7zy4ybEFMTatBywFY-Jxi9EHXveaVCFRfwDy2193e6uZp1DpGCsdBD9yW02SP4gca5LWaSWS-uRB8%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=eaf7152d5a9440eda850d6939311cf5f&_e=cqXn6ekZ2L2Jg8E63Pw2iqrDjSuhKkhOBDm14KbmPUQawaa7wA1jYMUJgkKM0D6zv3S1xUUhjNPehqlmJBG0Joo41lDsIVFAt7y7iV34nAK9TXG6zmNFtq0hpGTb4msLXY4S0t5k__dLTheFY_GcFI7L0Om-Y1cXkHF4N0hQ7WK7lk-hyRaxod2a9PxDP_7dn8rEMxTm2XYsrVWFRJ03Fo-Xe1Rvlg3JlSf922XJyf6p-Xd_QJknuVkPdgbh3gkQIVUe8xTxcubRuNhA5Qc8SDI7sD133SQtccAIIHoWMYQ-Tu9RrFgRsROKk-DDqJnI_7feArjrWGZfuRDYXE8GWyLDzXXp-zpwbcRQs2bQOSKZEAdhLlP3a-rHmXTf_mxkmL6LNHfbAOACEz-_QzNGptZvGJ47daKxpyjJQcQ2TDmCBYx8gwHXdBYNysG8C1Eqw3GR2tvF0q-e4CVVL-hs0gHLVY4uw1kAynsSRrpl_OM%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=eaf7152d5a9440eda850d6939311cf5f&_e=cqXn6ekZ2L2Jg8E63Pw2iqrDjSuhKkhOBDm14KbmPUQawaa7wA1jYMUJgkKM0D6zv3S1xUUhjNPehqlmJBG0Joo41lDsIVFAt7y7iV34nAK9TXG6zmNFtq0hpGTb4msLXY4S0t5k__dLTheFY_GcFI7L0Om-Y1cXkHF4N0hQ7WK7lk-hyRaxod2a9PxDP_7dn8rEMxTm2XYsrVWFRJ03Fo-Xe1Rvlg3JlSf922XJyf6p-Xd_QJknuVkPdgbh3gkQIVUe8xTxcubRuNhA5Qc8SH359jrQwMlojIu6T6q7xlEY30zelTzg84N1YLHsvjFmQVMrE9YD1bIpjpUX8Jt1M0e1xEjmElXpnTfBTAnc9d0i7dgqm0-mihkeuz-T5uIGGVXKe20bjyYAu7_Zo4YJj0ohkUNVz7cyVP60HaEvILkMbS3x8lPzitYY3KLUJDbMosJk_2gtYuo6sC5s3v-swDlms3gJeuDsMkyPMDI550c%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=eaf7152d5a9440eda850d6939311cf5f&_e=cqXn6ekZ2L2Jg8E63Pw2iqrDjSuhKkhOBDm14KbmPUQawaa7wA1jYMUJgkKM0D6zv3S1xUUhjNPehqlmJBG0Joo41lDsIVFAt7y7iV34nAK9TXG6zmNFtq0hpGTb4msLXY4S0t5k__dLTheFY_GcFI7L0Om-Y1cXkHF4N0hQ7WK7lk-hyRaxod2a9PxDP_7dn8rEMxTm2XYsrVWFRJ03Fo-Xe1Rvlg3JlSf922XJyf6p-Xd_QJknuVkPdgbh3gkQIVUe8xTxcubRuNhA5Qc8SIbNZGf2Y4OjwyjfWecjxJ4u231Vijiv2tt6-yNH3T05aYkEMNjXCkEr4SsAzCAyyGoEnVHVxSJUF5PVXydBBieZXD7-RR7rSVOTmdg4BkVFhXfwWsnTY1Vowup9e_k0C8sISIttkScgfV7q0ngEkhSAgkBwGwPZpK8fshLMQuK5vtm3l_zdr2fT2xX-_y80fWKrgwUYxdIGWpFehqmeItE%3D)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=eaf7152d5a9440eda850d6939311cf5f&_e=cqXn6ekZ2L2Jg8E63Pw2iqrDjSuhKkhOBDm14KbmPUQawaa7wA1jYMUJgkKM0D6zv3S1xUUhjNPehqlmJBG0Joo41lDsIVFAt7y7iV34nAK9TXG6zmNFtq0hpGTb4msLXY4S0t5k__dLTheFY_GcFI7L0Om-Y1cXkHF4N0hQ7WK7lk-hyRaxod2a9PxDP_7dn8rEMxTm2XYsrVWFRJ03Fo-Xe1Rvlg3JlSf922XJyf6p-Xd_QJknuVkPdgbh3gkQIVUe8xTxcubRuNhA5Qc8SJ3XEL7acl9Bj6AQRiMemgPUFk-VvCtL1zeesVcYa5yLj2pi4emc_vDbV7xMnPZVL1i6tjqH-Kh1QFVDYTM2dwxjhECU9gvtRNAWLEi0SZ7VlXBxodAL2BfQTTojkPZ2m-8sFY1LCoJZ5D5LqB0NnH8Fa2Z3m4u0T63tbepcHafm96c4R7fMOZsJ36LjXCu-R1ImaJhNTgCDoL1Fw5Tn52k%3D)
Herschel Walker

P.S. name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: Thank You.
body:
| | | | I'm grateful for your support.
---
---
Dear Peter,
Last night, we reached out to many great patriots, and asked for your help to meet our critical End-of-Month deadline.
We needed to raise $10,000 more to hit our numbers for August.
Thanks to your generosity, we raised over $15,000 yesterday evening.
Without your support, I wouldn't be able to remain as your Attorney General. Your faith and trust has provided me an incredible opportunity to represent you and West Virginia as I work to help defend America during this critical time. I am deeply appreciative of your friendship.
I will keep on fighting the good fight in the AG's office, and hope to never let you down.
Whether the issue involves the First Amendment, the Second Amendment, the Fourth Amendment, the Tenth Amendment, or just plain government overreach, we have some very big battles in front of us that will shape the future of our nation. We are going to need all of your support and prayers.
Thanks again for moving us forward.
---
Sincerely,
---
---
Patrick Morrisey Attorney General of West Virginia
---

clean_body: | | | | I'm grateful for your support. Dear Peter, Last night, we reached out to many great patriots, and asked for your help to meet our critical End-of-Month deadline. We needed to raise $10,000 more to hit our numbers for August. Thanks to your generosity, we raised over $15,000 yesterday evening. Without your support, I wouldn't be able to remain as your Attorney General. Your faith and trust has provided me an incredible opportunity to represent you and West Virginia as I work to help defend America during this critical time. I am deeply appreciative of your friendship. I will keep on fighting the good fight in the AG's office, and hope to never let you down. Whether the issue involves the First Amendment, the Second Amendment, the Fourth Amendment, the Tenth Amendment, or just plain government overreach, we have some very big battles in front of us that will shape the future of our nation. We are going to need all of your support and prayers. Thanks again for moving us forward. Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey Attorney General of West Virginia | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: The most restrictive abortion ban in the country just went into effect in TX
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Folks – Overnight, the most restrictive abortion ban in the country went into effect in Texas, banning abortions at six weeks. **This abortion ban is a dangerous attack on women’s reproductive rights and economic freedom.** But it doesn't stop there – across the country, GOP-led legislatures, including in New Hampshire, are passing dangerous legislation restricting access to women's health care like contraception, cancer screenings, and abortion. And in a few weeks, **the Supreme Court will hear a direct challenge to Roe v. Wade, a case that could completely gut the right to choose.** The right to abortion and contraception is a matter of personal autonomy, economic freedom, and health. Roe v. Wade has protected a woman's constitutional right to make their own health care decision for decades, and we must continue to protect this critical precedent. **[If you agree, add your name today in support of Roe v. Wade and reproductive freedom.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35064472/303923142/-1663056112?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzI4Yzk2ZC03NjBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=njKBhtttrzRjDypN_xNNf-yC_aZ29c3TSx9eT4mqpyU=&emci=9b5172af-6d0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=8728c96d-760b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=5452893)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35064473/303923143/-1663056112?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzI4Yzk2ZC03NjBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=njKBhtttrzRjDypN_xNNf-yC_aZ29c3TSx9eT4mqpyU=&emci=9b5172af-6d0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=8728c96d-760b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=5452893)
---
Senator Hassan will always stand up for a woman’s right to access safe, affordable health care and her constitutionally protected right to choose if and when to start a family.
**[At a time when women's rights are being stripped away across the country, please join us in protecting Roe v. Wade by adding your name today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35064474/303923144/-1663056112?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzI4Yzk2ZC03NjBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=njKBhtttrzRjDypN_xNNf-yC_aZ29c3TSx9eT4mqpyU=&emci=9b5172af-6d0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=8728c96d-760b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=5452893)**
Thank you for your time.
– Team Maggie

clean_body: | | | Folks – Overnight, the most restrictive abortion ban in the country went into effect in Texas, banning abortions at six weeks. This abortion ban is a dangerous attack on women’s reproductive rights and economic freedom. But it doesn't stop there – across the country, GOP-led legislatures, including in New Hampshire, are passing dangerous legislation restricting access to women's health care like contraception, cancer screenings, and abortion. And in a few weeks, the Supreme Court will hear a direct challenge to Roe v. Wade, a case that could completely gut the right to choose. The right to abortion and contraception is a matter of personal autonomy, economic freedom, and health. Roe v. Wade has protected a woman's constitutional right to make their own health care decision for decades, and we must continue to protect this critical precedent. | | Senator Hassan will always stand up for a woman’s right to access safe, affordable health care and her constitutionally protected right to choose if and when to start a family. Thank you for your time. – Team Maggie | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

| Friend,

Last night, Texas enacted the most restrictive abortion law in the country. The law prohibits abortions after six weeks, before most people know they are pregnant, and allows private citizens to sue abortion providers as well as anyone who helps someone access an abortion, from friends to spouses to ride-share drivers.

This issue should have been settled nearly 50 years ago with the landmark _Roe v. Wade_ decision. But thanks to Republicans like Paul Gosar undermining reproductive rights every chance they get, we are still fighting today for women to be able to make our own reproductive decisions.

**In order to protect reproductive rights for women in every state, we must expand the Democratic majority in Congress and defeat anti-choice members like Paul Gosar, who has a whopping 0% rating from NARAL.

[_That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $5 or more to my campaign right away to ensure I have the resources to defeat Paul Gosar and be a member of Congress who fights for my constituents’ personal liberties._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35064554/303923397/-1204788432?refcode=BLU-DDC-20210901-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTMxNWYxMi03NzBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xoj2YIwHTttK2CEx2s60VBb8RTUcvzSX6tEsPLJDe6Q=)**

| | Friend, Fair Fight Action’s thoughts are with all those impacted by Hurricane Ida. As cleanup, rebuilding, and recovery begins, we hope you and your loved ones are safe and healthy. To all those who would like to support recovery and relief to communities in the path of the storm, please consider supporting or sharing links to the following organizations who are involved in relief efforts:
* **[Imagine Water Works](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35064722/303923971/39005632?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzJiZDU5Yy03NzBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Dncq84enxA7pWzFqBZhTSHo2ISTTA6Aw0tClhydTTs=&emci=57ba5277-760b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d72bd59c-770b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=1037277)** : A climate justice organization operating a mutual aid network for those impacted by Hurricane Ida.
* [**Cajun Navy Relief:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35064723/303923972/183534463?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzJiZDU5Yy03NzBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Dncq84enxA7pWzFqBZhTSHo2ISTTA6Aw0tClhydTTs=&emci=57ba5277-760b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d72bd59c-770b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=1037277) Provides volunteer rescue operations as well as supplies for residents.
* [**Mutual Aid Disaster Relief:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35064724/303923973/502552?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzJiZDU5Yy03NzBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Dncq84enxA7pWzFqBZhTSHo2ISTTA6Aw0tClhydTTs=&emci=57ba5277-760b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d72bd59c-770b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=1037277) A grassroots volunteer network supporting impacted communities, especially those most marginalized, during crises.
* [**Another Gulf is Possible**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35064725/303923974/-1409237480?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzJiZDU5Yy03NzBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Dncq84enxA7pWzFqBZhTSHo2ISTTA6Aw0tClhydTTs=): A grassroots collective distributing donations to support vulnerable families and communities impacted by Hurricane Ida.
* [**Feed the Second Line**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35064726/303923975/-1670479659?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzJiZDU5Yy03NzBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Dncq84enxA7pWzFqBZhTSHo2ISTTA6Aw0tClhydTTs=&emci=57ba5277-760b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d72bd59c-770b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=1037277): A non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the culture bearers of New Orleans, working to secure and repair homes after Hurricane Ida.

name: NextGen America
subject: Take Action: Urge President Biden to Cancel Student Loan Debt
body:
Back to school, back to student debt —

Friend,
**With the return to campus for the Fall 2021 semester comes a burden for so many students — the weight of student debt. **
Getting back to campus should be a time of excitement and anticipation for what’s to come. But for so many, it’s a time of stress and pressure as the reality of student debt sets in. **We know it doesn’t have to be this way. **
While we work toward long-term solutions to make quality education accessible to all, our first step must be providing relief to borrowers struggling with the burden of debt.
In August, President Biden listened to organizers and activists such as yourself and extended the student loan payment pause until January 31, 2022. **Now, we’re calling on him to take the next step by canceling at least $50,000 in federal student loan debt. **
[Act now: Write to President Biden and urge him to cancel at least $50,000 in federal student loan debt to provide relief for not just students, but millions of borrowers. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35064888/303924912/1050356865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzJjMmQ1Ny03ODBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CVw3cXTNHO-Zh6aBZZNzAYzpioh4D_YM-LMRTaypmx0=&emci=47fa13dd-5e0a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=832c2d57-780b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172)

Student debt is not just an issue of economic opportunity, it’s a matter of racial and gender justice, too. The weight of student debt falls disproportionately on the shoulders of Black and brown Americans as well as women.

body:
The new Texas law is extreme and dangerous.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35065314/303926120/-1930076705?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210901-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzQyZmVmZi03OTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CHyXKoGNo9ZR7Lul8maOf_QAANW07_ffYrDJ9H3csug=)

| Peter,

When Donald Trump appointed a slate of far-right judges to the Court with the goal of overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , we knew we had to prepare for the worst. Last night, Trump’s Court failed to step in and stop a new Texas abortion restriction law from going into effect.

The new Texas law is extreme and dangerous. Not only does it prohibit abortions after six weeks, before most people know they are pregnant — it also enables private citizens to sue abortion providers and anyone who helps someone obtain an abortion, from friends to spouses to ride-share drivers.

**If Republicans win back the House in 2022, they have promised to do all they can to take away the choice women have over their own bodies and BAN abortion entirely at the federal level.

There is no choice: if we’re going to defend reproductive rights, we must protect and expand our Democratic majority, and that starts right here in PA-07. [_If you are able, please make a contribution to my campaign today so that I can stay in Congress fighting for reproductive rights._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35065315/303926121/-1930076705?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210901-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzQyZmVmZi03OTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CHyXKoGNo9ZR7Lul8maOf_QAANW07_ffYrDJ9H3csug=)**

In Congress, I have defended a woman’s right to choose time and time again, and I am proud to have a 100% rating from NARAL. Everyone deserves to make their own decisions about their health and future. We must come together to protect access to safe and legal abortion. [_**Any amount you can spare towards my re-election campaign will ensure that a pro-choice champion stays in Congress.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35065317/303926123/-1930076705?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210901-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzQyZmVmZi03OTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CHyXKoGNo9ZR7Lul8maOf_QAANW07_ffYrDJ9H3csug=)

name: Michael Bennet
subject: [PETITION] Defend Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35065343/303926203/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDQzZTIyYS03YTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bUCbL-_nldBGdP0EdEiJZlQwoH2ymn2PNxYsmpqV9Kk=)
Friend, At midnight last night, the Supreme Court allowed Texas’s extreme abortion law to go into effect. Texas’s new law prohibits abortions after six weeks. Most women don’t even know they’re pregnant at six weeks, so this is a near complete ban on abortions in the state. This is a draconian attack on women’s rights, yet the Supreme Court ignored calls last night to issue an injunction before the measure could become law. If they don’t act now, they could open the floodgates for other states to put similar laws in place — giving far-right state legislatures a roadmap to effectively overturn Roe v. Wade and undermine a woman’s right to access safe and legal abortion care. But the Supreme Court could put an end to all of this by blocking this dangerous abortion ban. **That’s why I’m asking you to add your name to my petition calling on the Supreme Court to immediately block the Texas anti-abortion law. They cannot sit by as far-right state legislatures attack women’s reproductive rights.** | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35065344/303926204/165144049?refcode=mfb-em-210901-scotus-petition-d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDQzZTIyYS03YTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bUCbL-_nldBGdP0EdEiJZlQwoH2ymn2PNxYsmpqV9Kk=&emci=4f43e22a-7a0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=5043e22a-7a0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=1295540)**
---
This is part of an ongoing, aggressive, and coordinated attack on reproductive freedom — and that’s why it’s so important we hold onto our Senate majority and expand it in 2022.
A Republican Senate led by Mitch McConnell would continue trying to gut abortion rights and rush to fill our courts with anti-choice judges.
Thanks for making your voice heard on this important issue. I’m proud to have you on the team and fight alongside you.
— Michael
---

Denver, CO 80201
United States

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: BREAKING: Abortion rights under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
Hi again friend,
First off, thank you so much for helping us reach our August fundraising goal. The dog days of summer can be brutal in Arizona, particularly for fundraising. **Your generosity is truly appreciated.**
But as ecstatic as I am that our campaign is doing well, I must be honest with you... today is not a happy day. Overnight, the U.S. Supreme Court chose not to overturn the new Texas abortion ban which goes into effect today. The court's inaction confirms our worst fears that **Roe v. Wade is about to be overturned** by the now ultra-conservative U.S. Supreme Court.
As un unapologetically pro-choice elected official, as a Congressional candidate, and as the only woman in this race, I want to be clear:
**Abortion should remain safe and legal and as your representative in Congress, I will fight like hell to ensure that it does.**
I'm proud to stand with organizations like Planned Parenthood Advocates of Arizona in the fight to keep reproductive health care, like abortion, safe and legal. [**That's why today I'm asking our supporters to contribute to Planned Parenthood Advocates of Arizona.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35065374/303926268/-905927926?_ga=2.93003929.52256423.1630526814-314180188.1630526814&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTgwM2Y2Zi03YTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h4h1Hjkc-RiPK2NKCJrU4UlBJCTf0Lug_1qDYqUGLys=&emci=961b0992-720b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=95803f6f-7a0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12898431)

And since saving Roe v. Wade starts with supporting unapologetically pro-choice candidates, I hope you will consider supporting our campaign, as well.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35065376/303926270/41694283?refcode=X_090121_ProtectAbortionServices&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTgwM2Y2Zi03YTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h4h1Hjkc-RiPK2NKCJrU4UlBJCTf0Lug_1qDYqUGLys=)

clean_body: Hi again friend, First off, thank you so much for helping us reach our August fundraising goal. The dog days of summer can be brutal in Arizona, particularly for fundraising. Your generosity is truly appreciated. But as ecstatic as I am that our campaign is doing well, I must be honest with you... today is not a happy day. Overnight, the U.S. Supreme Court chose not to overturn the new Texas abortion ban which goes into effect today. The court's inaction confirms our worst fears that Roe v. Wade is about to be overturned by the now ultra-conservative U.S. Supreme Court. As un unapologetically pro-choice elected official, as a Congressional candidate, and as the only woman in this race, I want to be clear: Abortion should remain safe and legal and as your representative in Congress, I will fight like hell to ensure that it does. I'm proud to stand with organizations like Planned Parenthood Advocates of Arizona in the fight to keep reproductive health care, like abortion, safe and legal. And since saving Roe v. Wade starts with supporting unapologetically pro-choice candidates, I hope you will consider supporting our campaign, as well. = Thank you for your continued support. Together we will beat back this appalling attack on our rights. In solidarity, Kirsten Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Join Us for a Special Event and Book Signing!
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Good afternoon, The "woke" education agenda is seeping into our schools. From government overreach to Critical Race Theory, our children's education is being threatened. As a mom and a U.S. Senate candidate, Jane Timken is proudly standing up as a leading voice to combat this leftist ideology and advocate for our children. Jane launched a listening tour on Critical Race Theory in May and has been meeting parents all around Ohio to discuss what exactly is happening in their children's schools - and how we can stand up and stop it. Another exciting stop on this statewide listening tour will be happening on **September 15th, 2021 from 6:30pm to 8:30pm**. Jane will be joined by the Author of "Woke Inc.," Vivek Ramaswamy, along with Columbus Academy moms, Andrea Gross and Amy Gonzalez who will share their personal experience fighting CRT. "Woke Inc." debuted as the number two best selling book on the New York Times best sellers list and can be found [HERE](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=8a429ae7c5a64ada8babdf85dceff072&_e=kNO5oMtiM7jMuygPeb6T0mDC7GOI41WQ7dRag0CTX3UA6kntPkSzOXUvmh4X92ctAVXoCg5kflFgozAWYba4ijirvmhVO4PvemE1vdTp1jmOii-KSvALqgM5j1W5MVn1wmavU_ruOAq-VnPVsI2o8f_KGdWwOKgwS1qEFuzihFz9Vfy25Yu2XekVO75JF2zNNtRARHPrFkhKMyGoTOYpyyMwnKMfRepjm7m9GE5KVnBKBitih4_6W8belXUpBoage6_d80YXfq3lYnJdV5Ll49ewTmRj2MFA-oK3SWMr3DlAHS8KyLXH_HYCzWcLG-m_a1KEnBFmis5uEY652YIpSg%3D%3D). **If you already have your copy, make sure to bring it to the event and have it signed by Vivek after the event!** There will be a limited amount of copies available at the event as well. Jane would love to have you there if you're available! Below please find a link to register for the event. **RSVP Link: ** [https://www.eventbrite.com/e/168945310973](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=8a429ae7c5a64ada8babdf85dceff072&_e=kNO5oMtiM7jMuygPeb6T0j9EBgdx_O4BXS0DOk3lWHkEqcoRdWFluB2_Zgo6bWoA5UKMReqfMKsWAUzlBwIwoCrCrs9d-A5vvvCj0F3fomQVKr3E_rwiaiq8aNFHQuuko986QC00iyM8w_iw4lOQhcx645RmWplLieoLlQM5FYOxcJOwqomP55z-N_wKHjcBfQb_lmfYengK1g-cj-f7qvbbcWTnuyhIJ-bzUC_mHToKD3RYJXWFnXT85SRhiGis6tXlUndJXher7ka2WbJVnxKuTP1J7vPdVh2STZeLfkI%3D) Please be on the lookout for more details as we get closer to the event. We hope to see you there! Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: Most extreme abortion law in the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
BREAKING: After Silence From Supreme Court, Texas Clinics Confront Near-Total Abortion Ban "The law, which prohibits abortions after six weeks and went into effect on Wednesday, was drafted by Texas lawmakers with the goal of frustrating efforts to challenge it in federal court." - New York Times | **BREAKING: After Silence From Supreme Court, Texas Clinics Confront Near-Total Abortion Ban**

"The law, which prohibits abortions after six weeks and went into effect on Wednesday, was drafted by Texas lawmakers with the goal of frustrating efforts to challenge it in federal court." - _New York Times_
---
Devastating news for reproductive rights, Peter.

This morning, the Supreme Court refused to block Texas' six-week abortion ban. Texas now has the most extreme abortion laws in the country, outlawing abortion before approximately 90% of women know they’re pregnant.

But this law doesn't just make most abortions illegal. It encourages citizens to file civil suits against abortion providers or anyone who helps facilitate an abortion after the six-week period (such as someone driving a pregnant person to an abortion clinic) by offering a monetary reward.

This law will prevent people in Texas from receiving the reproductive health care they need, and the Supreme Court refusing to block it leaves the door open for other states to follow suit. **It's only a matter of time before we see similar extreme anti-choice laws introduced in states across the country.**

As the only Democratic female doctor in Congress, Kim knows how important access to reproductive care is. That's why she's fighting back against these attacks on reproductive rights to ensure that personal health decisions remain between a person and their doctor only.

**[Are you with her? Add your name now to join Kim in the fight to defend reproductive rights and urge the Supreme Court to protect _Roe v. Wade_ >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35065837/303927605/-757829650?gpsid=8_30_20336&ms=em21_210901_txbill_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&refcode=em21_210901_txbill_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210901_txbill_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWY1OWU4Ni03YzBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndovKQSAXA4yrZ0yMPcqcNIW7WOPoWFxZS8SFbFVVj8=&emci=8e59e37d-5d0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=21f59e86-7c0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=15820338)**

Thanks, Team Schrier National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: defending abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
We must show that there is massive grassroots support for protecting accessible reproductive healthcare.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35066191/303928352/-182076786?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210901-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTM4MzdlZC03ZDBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ys2fb4ALWylNNZLts9FP78bTbGG_mi3TLC0GthudpGg=)

| It’s unconscionable that, in 2021, our generation must continue to fight for a right that should have been settled 48 years ago. But right now, the 6-3 conservative majority on the Supreme Court is on the path to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ completely.

Reproductive rights are under attack at every level of government, and at midnight last night, the Supreme Court allowed the nation’s most restrictive abortion law to go into effect in Texas. The law prohibits abortions after six weeks — before most people even know they are pregnant. The law also enables private citizens to sue abortion providers and anyone who helped someone else access an abortion, including spouses, friends, and even ride-share drivers taking a patient to their appointment. This ban is cruel and sets an absolutely devastating precedent.

**We must show that there is massive grassroots support for protecting accessible reproductive healthcare. If you agree that elected officials and the Supreme Court must uphold _Roe v. Wade_ and protect reproductive rights, _[please join me in adding your name to our petition now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35066193/303928354/954381072?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTM4MzdlZC03ZDBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ys2fb4ALWylNNZLts9FP78bTbGG_mi3TLC0GthudpGg=&emci=2921cf20-670b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=0e3837ed-7d0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=14239920)_**

We must keep working for each person’s right to make their own health care decisions. Thank you for standing with me on this crucial issue. [_**To send the message that abortion access cannot be stripped away, please sign our petition right away.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35066197/303928358/954381072?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTM4MzdlZC03ZDBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ys2fb4ALWylNNZLts9FP78bTbGG_mi3TLC0GthudpGg=&emci=2921cf20-670b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=0e3837ed-7d0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=14239920)

Sara

body:

body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=60e4db2cf92e49799509e379ef5e6077&_e=SXaTutYTjXg8kZe3ai_NHEdoUZSpD35L5FwJZkEx_QSqGQ5FCX_q6s-OIkbSVa7KbVVodE8q3Eo8pdDNoYRKhlfRoQwU_m0UtDDj8QJmGSl7Kp7wkxdc0OACoj7_qd-boja8qTLm0VERmFhnFkbMkGaWJiFL7NgVHDef49XDfyTS_iR8KTyFgnYY5AQ-VmKyFfnmvpgaKYHhzPwoP-M9p21Koz0HZmzwaxYlhYEcPjQPH1oLZsgzu9B9WQBAF-oagu2KTwEwuavvC5wVL5uxbKa5qWGh-X33pcmT3JZ4OagMWAhGLKDOaMpaJujp4OaHuoVRqjo0qa8TIs18kC6fjgkaO4laMswbonCN2DBSX7KMIMONw8upfqeryq-7AEplezMrxPzsVGpwzstVRt1BswCkKODCJCGbUbXTLhNkzCYdM8UzKGhaIgHU15Lw8WD24KTdsygYHSszZ5Eba3IC5A%3D%3D)
