Peter,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=60e4db2cf92e49799509e379ef5e6077&_e=SXaTutYTjXg8kZe3ai_NHEdoUZSpD35L5FwJZkEx_QSqGQ5FCX_q6s-OIkbSVa7KbVVodE8q3Eo8pdDNoYRKhlfRoQwU_m0UtDDj8QJmGSl7Kp7wkxdc0OACoj7_qd-boja8qTLm0VERmFhnFkbMkGaWJiFL7NgVHDef49XDfyTS_iR8KTyFgnYY5AQ-VmKyFfnmvpgaKYHhzPwoP-M9p21Koz0HZmzwaxYlhYEcPjQPH1oLZsgzu9B9WQBAF-oagzpHrj1ZaexcX1aII3l0Jhsh_2q0mLZlK9I5AevDV1PhiKbt_ZezDWe3xrk9NV11hAwEsNVdpNZwvY-d-fEtW60JnL59cRNdxEwhhqbwi1JalRuoRd469w1jQvhI3wSPaWgfkKsWwMOKu0aEvFlj-Ak5qWPx6YSgZx2P0B2xwn9BNKoZhEMG9TBdKIjswAUFjWggKnMp6FLbI6JdhpE05Q%3D%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=60e4db2cf92e49799509e379ef5e6077&_e=SXaTutYTjXg8kZe3ai_NHEdoUZSpD35L5FwJZkEx_QSqGQ5FCX_q6s-OIkbSVa7KbVVodE8q3Eo8pdDNoYRKhlfRoQwU_m0UtDDj8QJmGSl7Kp7wkxdc0OACoj7_qd-boja8qTLm0VERmFhnFkbMkGaWJiFL7NgVHDef49XDfyTS_iR8KTyFgnYY5AQ-VmKyFfnmvpgaKYHhzPwoP-M9p21Koz0HZmzwaxYlhYEcPjQPH1oLZsgzu9B9WQBAF-oaYMiV3sMf7TTmCnvfcvtffsC--8zA4txPUp5EeQCsFrwIOwl5CgSUrjRJq9euJ8sU74E0v9OllN5yW9QP3iGqzB0IiKjzIOSdasZ-0Z0E--BH6V5MByRZNmar7Ki1kb3v_YBq6QrP97_TUlliztHWLLSk_bs5l7qasXbdUsv1dw77qcVC4COKQfOn6jryxkpu8wUGy0j84sX4lTcI0ZLwNg%3D%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=60e4db2cf92e49799509e379ef5e6077&_e=SXaTutYTjXg8kZe3ai_NHEdoUZSpD35L5FwJZkEx_QSqGQ5FCX_q6s-OIkbSVa7KbVVodE8q3Eo8pdDNoYRKhlfRoQwU_m0UtDDj8QJmGSl7Kp7wkxdc0OACoj7_qd-boja8qTLm0VERmFhnFkbMkGaWJiFL7NgVHDef49XDfyTS_iR8KTyFgnYY5AQ-VmKyFfnmvpgaKYHhzPwoP-M9p21Koz0HZmzwaxYlhYEcPjQPH1oLZsgzu9B9WQBAF-oaOKFzyWRafTq_-fsPqMt2KjgE4mo_hMjjJSj_KOF2Y-mModcZxfYseY00ZiyUZH1vl3jb9PflPkAlwVrIYtnxpzEaN3_I2nPlYv944F2p8tqBQTahSNEexoELNBrHZBlHdIUelHMT0xrEuO5_hk31BLyYepiuk3ZcTmeaybcWgviCKS6NKmHWotN0zyuJ96xC7LsJu671rZeNEm4pgLswSA%3D%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=60e4db2cf92e49799509e379ef5e6077&_e=SXaTutYTjXg8kZe3ai_NHEdoUZSpD35L5FwJZkEx_QSqGQ5FCX_q6s-OIkbSVa7KbVVodE8q3Eo8pdDNoYRKhlfRoQwU_m0UtDDj8QJmGSl7Kp7wkxdc0OACoj7_qd-boja8qTLm0VERmFhnFkbMkGaWJiFL7NgVHDef49XDfyTS_iR8KTyFgnYY5AQ-VmKyFfnmvpgaKYHhzPwoP-M9p21Koz0HZmzwaxYlhYEcPjQPH1oLZsgzu9B9WQBAF-oal3-0AsKP6mCEgBrfzRIxREv0-q7UTE16h_Lr1zQSZUtEMpNlSiDu0xyFZ3Qbn8zYN-qGfLhgZmgM_pJB7fM1Kkkf0UG9Fkba0NIEe2s-8rZe26r5bYRYvXhipTLhyr53fMgRCFPGPxAjF57p4arTW6da7yOGCuksnw7w5i-slq5A0O--jC3c6ADN9WPDuX1ET5n8b1Rm9LvaJ86sjHhpVQ%3D%3D)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=60e4db2cf92e49799509e379ef5e6077&_e=SXaTutYTjXg8kZe3ai_NHEdoUZSpD35L5FwJZkEx_QSqGQ5FCX_q6s-OIkbSVa7KbVVodE8q3Eo8pdDNoYRKhlfRoQwU_m0UtDDj8QJmGSl7Kp7wkxdc0OACoj7_qd-boja8qTLm0VERmFhnFkbMkGaWJiFL7NgVHDef49XDfyTS_iR8KTyFgnYY5AQ-VmKyFfnmvpgaKYHhzPwoP-M9p21Koz0HZmzwaxYlhYEcPjQPH1oLZsgzu9B9WQBAF-oaVAEXUWY5SErUItucJtWJ8GLca_v4NccyHSTZbMrHjoRNDGsJM61Yvf77NnHpirdtYiiehlMM1DwG2wd3nqn1oFTUlKH2yfBF5yNT9Z916QPq40cBCVAcemqg4eCWpuR6N_nMBpkOCojTBE3fwtxNRgaONx7wozTs8FKyTCuxc3aijw6yCU5AgXPAQeLNHbuE5kPjgy3tnoCE-EyKFQl93w%3D%3D)

clean_body: I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. | Peter, Today in America, politicians pit American against American. Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural. I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie. I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast. I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got real fast. I'm from a working-class family. I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape. Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... if you work hard enough. Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it. You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982. I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL. My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, my heart was always in Georgia. And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country. Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term. The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path. That's why I'm running for the United States Senate. I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream. I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too. Very Respectfully, Herschel Walker P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. Thank you. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. clean_body: 🚨 YOUR NAME IS MISSING 🚨 | The radical Left is DESTROYING our country day by day and we have no choice but to step up to protect Trump’s legacy... Friend, This is important. The radical Left is DESTROYING our country day by day and we have no choice but to step up to protect Trump’s legacy before it’s completely erased. President Trump was WINNING like never before for America, and now look what’s happened. We really need your support, but when our team pulled a list of our strongest supporters and YOUR NAME was nowhere to be found. Why haven’t you stepped up, Friend? You used to be a TOP supporter, so we decided to give you one last chance... This is your one-time chance to claim your EXCLUSIVE offer and ensure we have the resources to STOP Joe Biden and his radical followers from DESTROYING our nation. We cannot wait a minute longer. We’re only offering this 300%-IMPACT offer to those who truly support President Trump and the Republican Party. If you fail to claim your offer we will be forced to give it to the next supporter in line. Don’t wait. Thank you, GOP Headquarters | Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. - | Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st Street SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

clean_body: | | | | | Team, I have some disappointing news to report: We fell short of our August funding goal. This isn’t something that happens often, but when it does, it puts our campaign at a real disadvantage. This is going to be one of the most closely watched races in the entire country. We need to properly fund this campaign in order to keep all of the progress that’s been made during Steve’s term. These goals are essential to keeping Battleground Nevada blue. So we’re extending our deadline -- just until Friday at midnight -- to raise $4,500 and get back on track. Can we count on you to chip in? → | | | | | | | | | | | | | Steve has four right-wing MAGA opponents vying to take back the Governor’s Mansion and undo all of the progressive changes that have helped millions of Nevadans live better, more prosperous lives. Meeting this new deadline is imperative to funding essential campaign programs, like digital ads, on-the-ground organizing, and more. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Eva | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for by Steve Sisolak for Governor Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. Fellow Conservative,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=3878ecd66ee44b0ca0ef4fbb6f4bb9b1&_e=j57-R26_5N_Og6e8f8_k0346yaR0UWYUr7VOj-WC2m_LTBQJ8KxhTgyiGM3Sa5zMUeaLS5QGvsrl6sR8OXV1APLXK-FvTQQWqGqbMfIvL1lsWfGVKVimD1h9poruDMmDf5RZt-5EtHAIXP2vDJ3TM1iuCu0wHY8HnSJ0Rdvbwq9LQUEz1MCn3ic3Qqr2X6XJQQYJMqWyiVHN1h79NbthQeOqvjyO8d68SPSJnT6KaIUlw82KLCZMkg6aWaaLClRcd58x8cgBOj4tdGzpsTPEvW_bpB_LqdsfTbCV0w58JQjLvw6iFT_ZWpN0BGXaBHdgRjbqOrl5r0Ftsril0Sv-YTrA8lnBmtXDvFQPYQKUXlSmLXGa1pmsjBHziFF5gNW5vs9oBTElZT57zX7VOR-lPr7k9zy1gt7T60n7i0Qh46UBXLBpyj4Lo0UJesgUzJGC5tXZNSFow3eIYek0GEHvqg%3D%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=3878ecd66ee44b0ca0ef4fbb6f4bb9b1&_e=j57-R26_5N_Og6e8f8_k0346yaR0UWYUr7VOj-WC2m_LTBQJ8KxhTgyiGM3Sa5zMUeaLS5QGvsrl6sR8OXV1APLXK-FvTQQWqGqbMfIvL1lsWfGVKVimD1h9poruDMmDf5RZt-5EtHAIXP2vDJ3TM1iuCu0wHY8HnSJ0Rdvbwq9LQUEz1MCn3ic3Qqr2X6XJQQYJMqWyiVHN1h79NbthQeOqvjyO8d68SPSJnT6KaIUlw82KLCZMkg6aWaaLClRcDFpUgBg3wzYEy3-EVstPR6-jtCRNl8tgOFo1TBaFoXGyAYpTmaG0a9KsVHre21Eljtm83m7mU3XOcgAmS1Q_1Ns-sIYERYWZ_h4LB1bbB7fZXull5lOaLsoiBmvcjaIHVCSKz7pb0V_5DS4XIBtdEia-0rfzRrdtOps9Z7hOsL9TAE3IuUDu7MgvhFRHXExz71FX0EbtxwD3kZYfDZUIvQ%3D%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=3878ecd66ee44b0ca0ef4fbb6f4bb9b1&_e=j57-R26_5N_Og6e8f8_k0346yaR0UWYUr7VOj-WC2m_LTBQJ8KxhTgyiGM3Sa5zMUeaLS5QGvsrl6sR8OXV1APLXK-FvTQQWqGqbMfIvL1lsWfGVKVimD1h9poruDMmDf5RZt-5EtHAIXP2vDJ3TM1iuCu0wHY8HnSJ0Rdvbwq9LQUEz1MCn3ic3Qqr2X6XJQQYJMqWyiVHN1h79NbthQeOqvjyO8d68SPSJnT6KaIUlw82KLCZMkg6aWaaLClRcj4EBTFsPpX-4jrNTzx6Ty48uWTaKNF-yHzpfrCPPpczRgk0hce4nSyVoXpZ-E6BIkTaG4v9KdjYB93ikkmI26DX8PAKZHYReEux8VpeD3ufccZgWIBEgd9mEfcrYmqF1W-c6ryB13xZh0InhceNorE33bQqwnL6JihurkLZ5L6jpl490oyO7Pgp6dGftAk9PDYIye2E8Q6rg4dkeoxYGLg%3D%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

clean_body: I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. | Fellow Conservative, Today in America, politicians pit American against American. Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural. I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie. I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast. I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got real fast. I'm from a working-class family. I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape. Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... if you work hard enough. Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it. You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982. I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL. My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, my heart was always in Georgia. And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country. Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term. The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path. That's why I'm running for the United States Senate. I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream. I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too. Very Respectfully, Herschel Walker P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. Thank you. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Derek, the Supreme Court just confirmed what we all feared -- the new conservative super-majority won’t protect reproductive rights in America.

_**That means it’s on us, Derek.**_

Right now the last line of defense we have protecting our reproductive rights is at the state level. We need to work together to elect Democrats who will protect our rights, from the State House to the Governor’s office.

body:

Breaking news, Peter.
**Donald Trump is now officially involved in the 2022 race for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania.**
Moments ago, Trump gave his "Complete and Total Endorsement" to one of our GOP opponents.
It’s clear: Donald Trump is willing to do _anything_ to keep Pennsylvania under GOP control in 2022. We can’t allow that to happen.
Peter, if our campaign ever needed your support, it’s now.
**After all, the most recent polls show John Fetterman as the *only* candidate who can win statewide in a general election.**

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: DHS’s E-Verify Authorizes Thousands of Illegal Immigrants to Work in U.S.
body:
The government’s pricey system to verify that employees are authorized to work legally in the U.S. is somewhat of a joke that has approved thousands of illegal immigrants and hundreds of thousands of foreigners without using its own photo-matching process to confirm identities.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | September 01, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56574&L=25732&F=H&)
---
# [DHS’s E-Verify Authorizes Thousands of Illegal Immigrants to Work in U.S.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56574&L=25732&F=H&)
The government’s pricey system to verify that employees are authorized to work legally in the U.S. is somewhat of a joke that has approved thousands of illegal immigrants and hundreds of thousands of foreigners without using its own photo-matching process to confirm identities. Additionally, the system, which is operated by the Department of Homeland Security’s (DHS) U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS), deemed around 4,000 foreign-born applicants as “employment authorized” based on employer-sponsored visas without verifying that candidates were actually hired by the employers that sponsored them.

[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56574&L=25732&F=H&)
|
---
| |
---
### [Court Rules Judicial Watch Lawsuit Can Proceed against Colorado Officials to Force Cleanup of State’s Voter Rolls ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56574&L=25697&F=H&) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch notes that registration rates over 100%, poor processing of out-of-date registrations, and high levels of inactive registrations “indicate an ongoing, systemic problem with Colorado’s voter list maintenance efforts.” Colorado’s “failure to comply with their ... voter list maintenance obligations” injures lawfully registered voters by “undermining their confidence in the integrity of the electoral process, discouraging their participation in the democratic process, and instilling in them the fear that their legitimate votes will be nullified or diluted.”
[READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56574&L=25697&F=H&)
---
### [‘Minor’ Major issues: Emails show Biden dog was nippier than White House said ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56574&L=25725&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvbWlub3ItbWFqb3ItaXNzdWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTAxMjIyODIw) NBC News The Biden family dog was a bit more of a problem pooch than the White House initially acknowledged, according to Secret Service emails obtained by the conservative legal group Judicial Watch.

The White House said at the end of March that Major, the Bidens’ 3-year-old German shepherd, was involved in a pair of “nipping” incidents, but the emails show he was involved in several more. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56574&L=25725&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvbWlub3ItbWFqb3ItaXNzdWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTAxMjIyODIw)

### [Over $2 Million to Study if U.S.’s Costly Latin American Anti-Gang Program Works ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56574&L=25720&F=H&) Judicial Watch In yet another example of taxpayer money going to waste, the U.S. government is spending north of $2 million to research if a costly, decade-old Latin American gang prevention initiative is working. Since 2010 Uncle Sam has funded a program called Gang Resistance Education and Training (GREAT) in El Salvador, Honduras, Panama, and Costa Rica but no one really knows if it has met its mission of preventing youth crime, violence, and gang involvement. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56574&L=25720&F=H&)

Friend,

It’s so simple:

Politicians and the government should not be in the business of telling people what to do with their personal, medical decisions.

I’m against mask mandates and vaccine passports. **_Period._**
[](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=62907c5615b34b75b1b8a4f287a536c5&_e=_YZC6nLChtBc0U_WmhHH1aiYZ7pneXVmzCZTqHVOaOsIaW3z0S_w74RU95ubTg5KmSsYCP_gt-FpJuHA8zXdOGbb5H32jLy_TejKoIYYOLfQojfs4lC1anofQfXzorcbSznFYHADx6Nct6Eak4rJmE5ODvjI5XENYa9eMMCEjSAwfa4gFrqBnsXquSniYjLcLYPUkrf5JNWPd0yeK-tSKXZkJJNvFSkxSMXUQzwNbzjhf_CGzWHyVH_IBQa4oTvB0oWWRUzQnoIapU2JbKZtofWNvK_vAVNUQzTO9CSzfyDIw5grmwIXfY5juYAGP2HedcJ9II2dqGYVC0mc2HV-ZGEVwNJR3ud00tFKrZwtD562IwMsopR0UyA9mH3pKJbW-_ju8eLMZHxP2VZqIb2ZkLM0saA6UpdKf0CaAC5IZp8Zzsr0B53OrMOjWxxVEg8_LEXouFOlt3f432UnPrppHPVZpPTCFeog084U3zYYSeU%3D)

Let’s put the individual back in control.](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=62907c5615b34b75b1b8a4f287a536c5&_e=_YZC6nLChtBc0U_WmhHH1aiYZ7pneXVmzCZTqHVOaOsIaW3z0S_w74RU95ubTg5KmSsYCP_gt-FpJuHA8zXdOGbb5H32jLy_TejKoIYYOLfQojfs4lC1anofQfXzorcbSznFYHADx6Nct6Eak4rJmE5ODvjI5XENYa9eMMCEjSAwfa4gFrqBnsXquSniYjLcLYPUkrf5JNWPd0yeK-tSKXZkJJNvFSkxSMXUQzwNbzjhf_CGzWHyVH_IBQa4oTvB0oWWRUzQnoIapU2JbKZtoReu-ut1abjymwOupbrgTUOs5TLyXzrHd9oxDBvcsvCae2ZK7VuUQ7RbowTSg3_FyaOxPijVgiRfqiPd8dx7ZSdC3iq6joQfDm3Kfu9pqCeEVIW4DtO1k62CEIb08MWkOrXN4zGA8lJvBKMuI15gawnCF0xC6m9lrnoo9yX8QoG6GN_fgs0x94IRMxDXv82duaxANAqaamR_srH4X6LIQ9M%3D)**

name: NDTC
subject: Welcoming Valerie Jarrett! (Build Blue Week)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
| 👀 In case you missed it...
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..0LLEJfXaDUTZrgqkN-xbqFMw9RkhlVYYamCzf_YtYbg)
Peter — We are HYPED for our first ever [**Build Blue Week**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..TZglc17WuOJH0x3LQ6N1e50sovs_JpYn0JGYOnMUD1g), happening September 18-24. Our line-up of speakers represents some of the best and brightest in Democratic politics. From elected officials to organizational leaders, these are the folks who are shaping the face of Democratic politics....and we brought them all together to help YOU reach your political goals (whether that might be running for office, working on a campaign, or driving forward progressive issues in your local community). [**With that, we're thrilled to announce that Former Senior Advisor to the Obama White House Valerie Jarrett will join us for Build Blue Week on Wednesday, September 22 to talk about uniting diverse communities through civic engagement.**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..HlOqK4yY_gn3r3ozip99Z8uuC22uv13VEOLIwxiR6Ic) Wednesday’s interview will cover effective ways you can mobilize your community into action, the importance of local civic engagement, and arm you with strategies you can put into action in your own community immediately. You won’t want to miss it! | [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..K7nMXgmNenFVLrwvsyq3zLJNRhe1z6rgGX16V_mLEaY)
---
_Oh, and don’t forget about_** _DNC Chair Jaime Harrison who_** _joins us for_[** _Panel Discussion: So You Want to Run for Office_**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..AkmEG7rESUUqPnUhwL9Q5adOihWxsX1dRtWCfcCjcvU) _on Monday, September 20!_
Monday kicks off with this collaborative discussion that will go over the ins and outs of making the important decision to run. Some of the biggest names in Democratic politics will share their journey to office and tell you what you need to know to launch your own journey to Election Day.
[**RSVP for this event (and the many more during Build Blue Week)! Spots are limited.**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..jZM8gVp390blpJULAg5S0eI4J3jpQGSCUtdr-F5naRc)
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..iAGRA1c97TiRgPFMqPAmmeor1n0o8stUAHWmZI_oFWw)
---
— _The NDTC Team_

[TAKE SURVEY NOW >>](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ac73de8e733643ba9ba4aa7cfca52a58&_e=6X5066LbJ9NJb-ISMDGXv5D5hAxM93hWdEfLtx2aRiwdrHpOjjfSaZb3hZQmCNL83-_SYlX80QwSyhrQj1uccrawqWaLeYG3GwXpNvn5aRjy6YRmDzDggCOb8imHM43v5FXl2Omm96rxq4mjiEbGiZ_LDmAStSsHVh_h045_QkTRmnRZ8Ni_fOIE-Tx0lYgdJiym91Rk13oLRbZtABWJqvS-R4E_yVoqmn35f2pg6m6g4tQB5U1O7_ESbZhspwI9E8-XZ_ZXM4EYJZ3BIJhYtCYheITZ8ugwJjj7kyCCNBdZhbu5R3-CCSB3MbbdyBpqROEYgm3RFC1OZqSWaH-8AhATN--27A3edA-GfCWEeSc-SCiaqGMJBJuqncGvTA7q9CzhtdZ3x1WIvV_KmehWuoBDWcSjojqVacIIRjYCOOBCeitxPwBkHp-3LBLWdGV9akuiZIIE8ajnLU_DokFClE0a3aNufcDL1IHYVCHLmGRS_BgVRZ3KNWOSyZqwmSsU)

My father didn’t call them _‘Fake News’_ for nothing.

The liberal media shamelessly spread dangerous lies and propaganda about my father and our movement for YEARS, and they weren’t the least bit sorry for it.

**Remember the FAKE Russia Hoax? Or what about the pathetic attempts to IMPEACH President Trump?_( yes, this one happened MULTIPLE TIMES)._**

The liberal mainstream media in this country is nothing more than a political mouthpiece for the radical Democratic party and we all know it.

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Support safe and accessible abortions in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
These ten abortion funds are providing much-needed resources to people seeking abortion care in Texas
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210901-2487-header&t=1&akid=2487%2E2526796%2EiZjaB5)
Abortion is health care and a constitutional right.
**And today, the Supreme Court directly attacked these inalienable truths by allowing an abortion ban in Texas that effectively upends Roe v. Wade.**
This harmful and oppressive law makes abortions illegal after six-weeks of pregnancy — when many people don’t even know they are pregnant, and it includes instances of rape and incest. The law also places a bounty of $10,000 on abortion providers or anyone who helps faciliate an abortion after six weeks.
These abortion restrictions have always been about abusing power and taking away the right for people to choose what to do with their bodies. This is the fight of our lives — and we’re not going to allow these attacks on our reproductive freedom. **At this moment, access to abortion care in Texas has become extremely limited, and patients in the state urgently need our support.**
[Can you split a contribution to these ten abortion funds providing much-needed resources to folks seeking abortion care in Texas? 100% of your contribution will go directly to these organizations.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210901?refcode=em20210901-2487-P_FND_CHA_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2487_2526796_iZjaB5&akid=2487%2E2526796%2EiZjaB5)
**[Split a contribution](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210901?refcode=em20210901-2487-P_FND_CHA_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2487_2526796_iZjaB5&akid=2487%2E2526796%2EiZjaB5)**
This is what we feared when Trump nominated Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court. Survivors warned that sexual assault is about abuse of power, and a judge credibly accused of such shouldn’t be trusted with the power to decide the rights of the vulnerable.
We know that this harmful and oppressive law will disproportionately affect low-income communities and communities of color in Texas. While the wealthy will have the means to access safe abortion care in other states, the most vulnerable will not.
[These organizations are doing the work in Texas to remove financial and logistical barriers to accessing safe abortions. If you can, please split an urgent $3 contribution or anything you can right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210901?refcode=em20210901-2487-P_FND_CHA_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2487_2526796_iZjaB5&akid=2487%2E2526796%2EiZjaB5)
We won’t stop fighting to secure our reproductive freedom.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210901?refcode=em20210901-2487-P_FND_CHA_LEG&t=23&refcode2=2487_2526796_iZjaB5&akid=2487%2E2526796%2EiZjaB5)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210901-2487-P_FND_CHA_LEG&t=24&akid=2487%2E2526796%2EiZjaB5)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2487%2E2526796%2EiZjaB5) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2487%2E2526796%2EiZjaB5) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2487%2E2526796%2EiZjaB5)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2487%2E2526796%2EiZjaB5)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

Donald J. Trump September 1st, 2021
Endorsement of Sean Parnell
Sean Parnell is running for the United States Senate to serve the Great Commonwealth of Pennsylvania. Sean bravely fought for our Country as a Captain in the U.S. Army and was awarded two Bronze Stars (one for valor!) and the Purple Heart. Unlike our current administration, he never left anyone behind. Sean is a great candidate, who got robbed in his congressional run in the Crime of the Century—the 2020 Presidential Election Scam. He will make Pennsylvania very proud and will fight for Election Integrity, Strong Borders, our Second Amendment, Energy Jobs, and so much more. Sean Parnell will always put America First. He has my Complete and Total Endorsement!

Donald J. Trump September 1st, 2021
Endorsement of Joe Kent
Joe Kent is a retired Green Beret and Gold Star husband running against RINO and incompetent Congresswoman Jaime Herrera Beutler in the 3rd District of the State of Washington. Joe served his country proudly for many years and understands the tremendous cost of America's wars in the Middle East, and elsewhere. In Congress, Joe will be a warrior for the America First agenda, unlike Jaime Herrera Beutler who voted, despite the facts, against the Republican Party and for the Democrats' Impeachment Scam.
Joe Kent is strong on Crime and the Border, loves our Military and our Vets, and will protect our Second Amendment, which is under siege. I met Joe at Dover Air Force Base on the evening that his wife was being brought back from the Middle East, where she had been killed in combat. It was a very sad moment in Joe’s life, but I was incredibly impressed with him and told him that he should someday run for office—we need his voice and leadership in Washington, D.C. Now he is running, and Joe Kent has my Complete and Total Endorsement!

Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump September 1st, 2021 Endorsement of Sean Parnell Sean Parnell is running for the United States Senate to serve the Great Commonwealth of Pennsylvania. Sean bravely fought for our Country as a Captain in the U.S. Army and was awarded two Bronze Stars (one for valor!) and the Purple Heart. Unlike our current administration, he never left anyone behind. Sean is a great candidate, who got robbed in his congressional run in the Crime of the Century—the 2020 Presidential Election Scam. He will make Pennsylvania very proud and will fight for Election Integrity, Strong Borders, our Second Amendment, Energy Jobs, and so much more. Sean Parnell will always put America First. He has my Complete and Total Endorsement! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump September 1st, 2021 Endorsement of Joe Kent Joe Kent is a retired Green Beret and Gold Star husband running against RINO and incompetent Congresswoman Jaime Herrera Beutler in the 3rd District of the State of Washington. Joe served his country proudly for many years and understands the tremendous cost of America's wars in the Middle East, and elsewhere. In Congress, Joe will be a warrior for the America First agenda, unlike Jaime Herrera Beutler who voted, despite the facts, against the Republican Party and for the Democrats' Impeachment Scam. Joe Kent is strong on Crime and the Border, loves our Military and our Vets, and will protect our Second Amendment, which is under siege. I met Joe at Dover Air Force Base on the evening that his wife was being brought back from the Middle East, where she had been killed in combat. It was a very sad moment in Joe’s life, but I was incredibly impressed with him and told him that he should someday run for office—we need his voice and leadership in Washington, D.C. Now he is running, and Joe Kent has my Complete and Total Endorsement! | ---|--- Donald J.
